1	"""
2	Staff portal routes — only accessible via /staff-login page.
3	
4	Super Admin (is_admin=True):
5	  GET  /api/admin/users                    list all users
6	  GET  /api/admin/users/{id}               user detail
7	  PUT  /api/admin/users/{id}               edit any user (role, ban, etc)
8	  PUT  /api/admin/users/{id}/password      reset any user's password
9	  POST /api/admin/users/{id}/make-admin    promote to admin
10	  POST /api/admin/users/{id}/make-venue-owner
11	  POST /api/admin/users                    create staff account
12	
13	  GET  /api/admin/venues                   all venues
14	  PUT  /api/admin/venues/{id}/verify       verify a venue
15	  PUT  /api/admin/venues/{id}/suspend      suspend a venue
16	
17	  POST /api/admin/tournaments/{id}/assign-match-admin   assign match admin
18	  GET  /api/admin/tournaments/{id}/admins               list match admins
19	
20	  GET  /api/admin/stats                    dashboard stats
21	
22	Turf Owner (is_venue_owner=True):
23	  GET  /api/staff/my-venue                 own venue info
24	  GET  /api/staff/my-listings              listings for their venue
25	  GET  /api/staff/my-bookings              bookings for their venue
26	  GET  /api/staff/my-tournaments           tournaments at their venue
27	  POST /api/staff/tournaments/{id}/assign-match-admin
28	
29	Match Admin (assigned to tournament):
30	  GET  /api/staff/tournaments/{id}/matches       matches for tournament
31	  POST /api/staff/tournaments/{id}/matches       record a match
32	  PUT  /api/staff/matches/{id}                   edit match scores
33	  POST /api/staff/matches/{id}/verify            verify match
34	  GET  /api/staff/tournaments/{id}/participants  list registrations
35	"""
36	
37	from app.core.security import hash_password
38	from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, status
39	from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
40	
41	from app.api.deps import get_current_user
42	from app.db.session import get_db
43	from app.models.match import Match, MatchParticipant, Tournament, TournamentAdmin, TournamentRegistration
44	from app.models.user import User
45	from app.models.venue import Venue
46	from app.services.match import create_match, serialize_match, verify_match
47	from app.services.venue import get_user_venue, serialize_venue
48	
49	router = APIRouter()
50	
51	
52	def _require_admin(user: User) -> None:
53	    if not user.is_admin:
54	        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail="Super admin access required")
55	
56	
57	def _require_venue_staff(user: User) -> None:
58	    if not user.is_venue_owner and not user.is_admin:
59	        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail="Venue owner access required")
60	
61	
62	def _is_tournament_admin(db: Session, user: User, tournament_id: int) -> bool:
63	    """Returns True if user is super admin or assigned match admin for this tournament."""
64	    if user.is_admin:
65	        return True
66	    return db.query(TournamentAdmin).filter(
67	        TournamentAdmin.tournament_id == tournament_id,
68	        TournamentAdmin.user_id == user.id,
69	    ).first() is not None
70	
71	
72	# ── Super Admin — Users ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
73	
74	@router.get("/admin/stats")
75	def admin_stats(current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user), db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
76	    _require_admin(current_user)
77	    return {
78	        "total_users": db.query(User).count(),
79	        "total_venues": db.query(Venue).count(),
80	        "total_tournaments": db.query(Tournament).count(),
81	        "total_matches": db.query(Match).count(),
82	        "pending_matches": db.query(Match).filter(Match.status == "scheduled").count(),
83	    }
84	
85	
86	@router.get("/admin/users")
87	def list_all_users(
88	    skip: int = 0, limit: int = 50, search: str = "",
89	    current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
90	    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
91	):
92	    _require_admin(current_user)
93	    q = db.query(User)
94	    if search:
95	        q = q.filter(
96	            User.username.ilike(f"%{search}%") |
97	            User.email.ilike(f"%{search}%") |
98	            User.name.ilike(f"%{search}%")
99	        )
100	    users = q.order_by(User.created_at.desc()).offset(skip).limit(min(limit, 200)).all()
101	    return [_user_summary(u) for u in users]
102	
103	
104	@router.get("/admin/users/{user_id}")
105	def get_user_detail(
106	    user_id: int,
107	    current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
108	    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
109	):
110	    _require_admin(current_user)
111	    u = db.get(User, user_id)
112	    if not u:
113	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="User not found")
114	    return _user_summary(u)
115	
116	
117	@router.put("/admin/users/{user_id}")
118	def edit_user(
119	    user_id: int,
120	    payload: dict,
121	    current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
122	    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
123	):
124	    _require_admin(current_user)
125	    u = db.get(User, user_id)
126	    if not u:
127	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="User not found")
128	    allowed = {"name", "city", "is_active", "is_admin", "is_venue_owner", "bio"}
129	    for k, v in payload.items():
130	        if k in allowed:
131	            setattr(u, k, v)
132	    db.commit()
133	    return _user_summary(u)
134	
135	
136	@router.put("/admin/users/{user_id}/password")
137	def reset_user_password(
138	    user_id: int,
139	    payload: dict,
140	    current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
141	    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
142	):
143	    _require_admin(current_user)
144	    u = db.get(User, user_id)
145	    if not u:
146	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="User not found")
147	    new_pw = payload.get("new_password", "")
148	    if len(new_pw) < 6:
149	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="Password must be at least 6 characters")
150	    u.hashed_password = hash_password(new_pw)
151	    db.commit()
152	    return {"message": f"Password updated for @{u.username}"}
153	
154	
155	@router.post("/admin/users", status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
156	def create_staff_account(
157	    payload: dict,
158	    current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
159	    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
160	):
161	    """Create a turf owner or match admin account."""
162	    _require_admin(current_user)
163	    from app.services.users import get_user_by_username, get_user_by_email
164	    if get_user_by_username(db, payload.get("username", "")):
165	        raise HTTPException(status_code=409, detail="Username already taken")
166	    if get_user_by_email(db, payload.get("email", "")):
167	        raise HTTPException(status_code=409, detail="Email already registered")
168	    u = User(
169	        username=payload["username"].lower().strip(),
170	        email=payload["email"].lower().strip(),
171	        hashed_password=hash_password(payload.get("password", "changeme123")),
172	        auth_provider="password",
173	        name=payload.get("name", payload["username"]),
174	        is_venue_owner=payload.get("is_venue_owner", False),
175	        is_admin=payload.get("is_admin", False),
176	    )
177	    db.add(u)
178	    db.commit()
179	    db.refresh(u)
180	    return _user_summary(u)
181	
182	
183	# ── Super Admin — Venues ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
184	
185	@router.get("/admin/venues")
186	def all_venues(
187	    current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
188	    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
189	):
190	    _require_admin(current_user)
191	    venues = db.query(Venue).order_by(Venue.created_at.desc()).all()
192	    return [serialize_venue(v) for v in venues]
193	
194	
195	@router.post("/admin/venues/{venue_id}/verify")
196	def verify_venue(
197	    venue_id: int,
198	    current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
199	    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
200	):
201	    _require_admin(current_user)
202	    v = db.get(Venue, venue_id)
203	    if not v:
204	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Venue not found")
205	    v.is_verified = True
206	    db.commit()
207	    return {"message": f"Venue '{v.name}' verified"}
208	
209	
210	@router.post("/admin/venues/{venue_id}/suspend")
211	def suspend_venue(
212	    venue_id: int,
213	    current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
214	    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
215	):
216	    _require_admin(current_user)
217	    v = db.get(Venue, venue_id)
218	    if not v:
219	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Venue not found")
220	    v.is_active = not v.is_active
221	    db.commit()
222	    return {"message": f"Venue {'activated' if v.is_active else 'suspended'}"}
223	
224	
225	# ── Tournament admin assignment ───────────────────────────────────────────────
226	
227	@router.post("/admin/tournaments/{tournament_id}/assign-match-admin")
228	def assign_match_admin(
229	    tournament_id: int,
230	    payload: dict,
231	    current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
232	    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
233	):
234	    """Assign a user as match admin for a tournament. Super admin or venue owner can do this."""
235	    if not current_user.is_admin and not current_user.is_venue_owner:
236	        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail="Not authorised")
237	
238	    t = db.get(Tournament, tournament_id)
239	    if not t:
240	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Tournament not found")
241	
242	    # If venue owner, they can only assign to their own tournaments
243	    if current_user.is_venue_owner and not current_user.is_admin:
244	        from app.services.venue import get_user_venue
245	        my_venue = get_user_venue(db, current_user.id)
246	        if not my_venue or t.venue_id != my_venue.id:
247	            raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail="You can only assign admins to your own tournaments")
248	
249	    username = payload.get("username", "")
250	    from app.services.users import get_user_by_username
251	    target = get_user_by_username(db, username)
252	    if not target:
253	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=f"User @{username} not found")
254	
255	    # Check if already assigned
256	    existing = db.query(TournamentAdmin).filter(
257	        TournamentAdmin.tournament_id == tournament_id,
258	        TournamentAdmin.user_id == target.id,
259	    ).first()
260	    if existing:
261	        return {"message": f"@{username} is already a match admin for this tournament"}
262	
263	    ta = TournamentAdmin(
264	        tournament_id=tournament_id,
265	        user_id=target.id,
266	        assigned_by=current_user.id,
267	    )
268	    db.add(ta)
269	    db.commit()
270	    return {"message": f"@{username} assigned as match admin for tournament #{tournament_id}"}
271	
272	
273	@router.delete("/admin/tournaments/{tournament_id}/assign-match-admin/{user_id}")
274	def remove_match_admin(
275	    tournament_id: int,
276	    user_id: int,
277	    current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
278	    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
279	):
280	    if not current_user.is_admin and not current_user.is_venue_owner:
281	        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail="Not authorised")
282	    ta = db.query(TournamentAdmin).filter(
283	        TournamentAdmin.tournament_id == tournament_id,
284	        TournamentAdmin.user_id == user_id,
285	    ).first()
286	    if not ta:
287	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Assignment not found")
288	    db.delete(ta)
289	    db.commit()
290	    return {"message": "Match admin removed"}
291	
292	
293	@router.get("/admin/tournaments/{tournament_id}/admins")
294	def list_tournament_admins(
295	    tournament_id: int,
296	    current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
297	    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
298	):
299	    if not current_user.is_admin and not current_user.is_venue_owner:
300	        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail="Not authorised")
301	    admins = db.query(TournamentAdmin).filter(
302	        TournamentAdmin.tournament_id == tournament_id
303	    ).all()
304	    result = []
305	    for ta in admins:
306	        u = db.get(User, ta.user_id)
307	        if u:
308	            result.append({"user_id": u.id, "username": u.username, "name": u.name})
309	    return result
310	
311	
312	# ── Turf Owner / Match Admin — Staff portal ───────────────────────────────────
313	
314	@router.get("/staff/my-venue")
315	def my_venue(
316	    current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
317	    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
318	):
319	    _require_venue_staff(current_user)
320	    v = get_user_venue(db, current_user.id)
321	    if not v:
322	        return {"venue": None, "message": "No venue found. Create one first."}
323	    from app.services.venue import list_listings, serialize_listing, get_venue_bookings
324	    listings = list_listings(db, v.id)
325	    bookings = get_venue_bookings(db, v.id)
326	    return {
327	        "venue": serialize_venue(v),
328	        "listings": [serialize_listing(l) for l in listings],
329	        "bookings": [
330	            {
331	                "id": b.id, "listing_id": b.listing_id,
332	                "booking_date": b.booking_date, "start_time": b.start_time,
333	                "end_time": b.end_time, "status": b.status, "user_id": b.user_id,
334	            }
335	            for b in bookings
336	        ],
337	    }
338	
339	
340	@router.get("/staff/my-tournaments")
341	def my_tournaments(
342	    current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
343	    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
344	):
345	    _require_venue_staff(current_user)
346	    v = get_user_venue(db, current_user.id)
347	    venue_id = v.id if v else 0
348	
349	    # Super admins see all tournaments they created
350	    if current_user.is_admin:
351	        ts = db.query(Tournament).filter(Tournament.created_by == current_user.id).all()
352	    else:
353	        ts = db.query(Tournament).filter(Tournament.venue_id == venue_id).all() if venue_id else []
354	
355	    from app.services.match import serialize_tournament
356	    return [serialize_tournament(t, db) for t in ts]
357	
358	
359	@router.get("/staff/tournaments/{tournament_id}/participants")
360	def tournament_participants(
361	    tournament_id: int,
362	    current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
363	    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
364	):
365	    if not _is_tournament_admin(db, current_user, tournament_id):
366	        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail="Not assigned to this tournament")
367	    regs = db.query(TournamentRegistration).filter(
368	        TournamentRegistration.tournament_id == tournament_id
369	    ).all()
370	    result = []
371	    for r in regs:
372	        u = db.get(User, r.user_id)
373	        if u:
374	            result.append({
375	                "user_id": u.id, "username": u.username, "name": u.name,
376	                "payment_status": r.payment_status, "registered_at": r.registered_at,
377	            })
378	    return result
379	
380	
381	@router.get("/staff/tournaments/{tournament_id}/matches")
382	def tournament_matches(
383	    tournament_id: int,
384	    current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
385	    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
386	):
387	    if not _is_tournament_admin(db, current_user, tournament_id):
388	        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail="Not assigned to this tournament")
389	    matches = db.query(Match).filter(Match.tournament_id == tournament_id).all()
390	    return [serialize_match(m) for m in matches]
391	
392	
393	@router.put("/staff/matches/{match_id}")
394	def edit_match(
395	    match_id: int,
396	    payload: dict,
397	    current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
398	    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
399	):
400	    """Edit match details and participant scores."""
401	    match = db.get(Match, match_id)
402	    if not match:
403	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Match not found")
404	    if not _is_tournament_admin(db, current_user, match.tournament_id or 0) and not current_user.is_admin:
405	        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail="Not authorised to edit this match")
406	
407	    # Update match fields
408	    for field in ("notes", "played_at", "match_type", "game_mode"):
409	        if field in payload:
410	            setattr(match, field, payload[field])
411	
412	    # Update participant scores
413	    if "participants" in payload:
414	        for p_data in payload["participants"]:
415	            p = db.query(MatchParticipant).filter(
416	                MatchParticipant.match_id == match_id,
417	                MatchParticipant.user_id == p_data.get("user_id"),
418	            ).first()
419	            if p:
420	                for field in ("result", "score", "rank", "kills", "assists", "deaths", "custom_stats"):
421	                    if field in p_data:
422	                        setattr(p, field, p_data[field])
423	
424	    db.commit()
425	    db.refresh(match)
426	    return serialize_match(match)
427	
428	
429	@router.post("/staff/matches/{match_id}/verify")
430	def staff_verify_match(
431	    match_id: int,
432	    current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
433	    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
434	):
435	    match = db.get(Match, match_id)
436	    if not match:
437	        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Match not found")
438	    if not _is_tournament_admin(db, current_user, match.tournament_id or 0) and not current_user.is_admin:
439	        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail="Not authorised")
440	    try:
441	        match = verify_match(db, match_id, current_user.id)
442	    except ValueError as e:
443	        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(e))
444	    return serialize_match(match)
445	
446	
447	# ── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
448	
449	def _user_summary(u: User) -> dict:
450	    return {
451	        "id": u.id,
452	        "username": u.username,
453	        "email": u.email,
454	        "name": u.name,
455	        "city": u.city,
456	        "is_admin": u.is_admin,
457	        "is_venue_owner": u.is_venue_owner,
458	        "is_active": u.is_active,
459	        "is_verified": u.is_verified,
460	        "avatar_url": u.avatar_url,
461	        "created_at": u.created_at,
462	    }

<status>completed</status>
<summary>Dynamic workflow "Map backend auth/roles, venue domain, admin frontend, and design language for turf-owner panel design" completed</summary>
<result>{"backend-auth":{"summary":"AUTH MECHANISM (backend/app/core/security.py): JWT via python-jose, HS256 (security.py:9), signed with settings.SECRET_KEY. Token payload is ONLY {"sub": subject, "exp": expire} (security.py:23) — sub is str(user.id), no role/email/username claims in the token. create_access_token (security.py:21-24): `def create_access_token(subject: str, expires_delta: timedelta | None = None) -> str: expire = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + (expires_delta or timedelta(minutes=settings.ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES)); payload = {"sub": subject, "exp": expire}; return jwt.encode(payload, settings.SECRET_KEY, algorithm=ALGORITHM)`. decode_access_token (security.py:27-33) returns the "sub" string or None on JWTError. Passwords hashed with passlib bcrypt CryptContext (security.py:10, hash_password:13-14, verify_password:17-18).

DEPENDENCIES (backend/app/api/deps.py): OAuth2PasswordBearer tokenUrl="/api/auth/login" (deps.py:10), plus optional variant auto_error=False (deps.py:11). get_current_user (deps.py:14-21): decodes token, loads user by int(sub) via get_user_by_id, raises 401 if missing/invalid or `not user.is_active`. get_optional_user (deps.py:24-35) returns User|None. THERE IS NO ADMIN DEPENDENCY — no get_current_admin/require_admin dependency exists in deps.py. Admin gating is done per-route with plain helper functions inside route modules that take the already-resolved user:
- backend/app/api/routes/admin.py:52-54: `def _require_admin(user: User) -> None: if not user.is_admin: raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail="Super admin access required")`
- backend/app/api/routes/admin.py:57-59: `def _require_venue_staff(user: User) -> None: if not user.is_venue_owner and not user.is_admin: raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail="Venue owner access required")`
- backend/app/api/routes/admin.py:62-69: `_is_tournament_admin(db, user, tournament_id)` returns True if user.is_admin or a TournamentAdmin row (tournament_id, user_id) exists.
- backend/app/api/routes/matches.py:84-85 has its own duplicate `_require_admin` (403 if not user.is_admin). Other routes inline-check `current_user.is_admin` / `current_user.is_venue_owner` / `is_venue_staff(db, venue_id, user_id)` (venues.py:119,135,150,168,208,225,241,257; activity.py:106,153,224,260,266; vouchers.py:307).

ROLES (backend/app/models/user.py:41-45): boolean flags, not enum: is_active (default True), is_admin (default False), is_verified (default False), is_venue_owner (default False). Role taxonomy documented in admin.py:1-35 docstring: Super Admin (is_admin=True) → /api/admin/* user mgmt (list/detail/edit incl. role+ban, password reset, make-admin, make-venue-owner, create staff account), venue verify/suspend, assign match admins, /api/admin/stats; Turf Owner (is_venue_owner=True) → /api/staff/my-venue, /api/staff/my-listings, /api/staff/my-bookings, /api/staff/my-tournaments, /api/staff/tournaments/{id}/assign-match-admin; Match Admin (row in TournamentAdmin table, models/match.py) → /api/staff/tournaments/{id}/matches (GET/POST), PUT /api/staff/matches/{id}, POST /api/staff/matches/{id}/verify, GET /api/staff/tournaments/{id}/participants. Docstring says the staff portal is reached via a /staff-login page. Editable fields via PUT /api/admin/users/{id} are whitelisted: {"name","city","is_active","is_admin","is_venue_owner","bio"} (admin.py:128). Turf-owner venue resolution uses get_user_venue (app/services/venue.py) — e.g. activity.py:260-266 requires is_venue_owner and a venue owned by the user unless is_admin.

USER MODEL other fields (models/user.py:12-56): id, username (String(40) unique), email (String(255) unique), hashed_password (nullable — null for google users), auth_provider ("password"|"google", default "password"), name, display_name, gender, date_of_birth (str YYYY-MM-DD), phone, phone_verified, avatar_url, photo_url, bio, city, state, country (default "India"), postal_code, interests + ranked_interests (JSON arrays stored as Text), profile_edit_date, profile_edits_today, created_at, updated_at. EmailOtp model (models/user.py:59-72): email, username, hashed_password, otp_code (6 chars), attempts, consumed, expires_at, created_at.

AUTH ENDPOINTS (backend/app/api/routes/auth.py, mounted under /api/auth per tokenUrl):
- GET /interests → {"interests": [...18 strings...]} (auth.py:46-48; list at schemas/auth.py:4-9).
- GET /username/{username} → UsernameAvailability {username, available} (auth.py:51-55); rule: 4-16 chars, alnum+underscore, not taken.
- POST /signup/start: SignupStartRequest {username(4-16, alnum/underscore, lowercased), email:EmailStr, password(8-128)} → 409 if email/username taken; creates EmailOtp (6-digit, 10-min expiry, emails OTP) → SignupStartResponse {message, dev_otp: str|None — OTP echoed only when settings.ENVIRONMENT=="local"} (auth.py:58-65).
- POST /signup/verify: SignupVerifyRequest {email, otp(6)} → 201 TokenResponse {access_token, token_type:"bearer"} (auth.py:68-78); consume_signup_otp (services/users.py:132-165) creates User with auth_provider="password"; max 5 attempts; sends welcome email fire-and-forget.
- POST /login: LoginRequest {identifier (email OR username, 3-255), password} → TokenResponse or 401 (auth.py:81-86). token_for(user) = TokenResponse(access_token=create_access_token(str(user.id))) (auth.py:42-43).
- POST /password/forgot: {identifier} → PasswordOtpResponse {message, dev_otp} — always same message (no account enumeration) (auth.py:89-95).
- POST /password/reset: ForgotPasswordVerifyRequest {identifier, otp(6), new_password(8-128)} → {"message":"Password updated"} or 400 (auth.py:98-103).
- POST /google: GoogleAuthRequest {id_token (min 20 chars)} → TokenResponse (auth.py:106-117). Verifies Google ID token server-side via google.oauth2.id_token.verify_oauth2_token(payload.id_token, requests.Request(), settings.GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID); 503 if GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID unset, 401 on invalid token or missing email claim. upsert_google_user (services/users.py:179-199): existing user by email → sets auth_provider="google", backfills name/avatar; else creates user with hashed_password=None and auto-generated username from email local-part (available_google_username, users.py:168-176).
- GET /me → UserRead via serialize_user(current_user) (auth.py:120-122). UserRead (schemas/user.py:5-30) includes is_admin, is_verified, is_venue_owner, auth_provider, interests/ranked_interests as list[str], profile_edit_date, profile_edits_today — so the frontend learns roles from /me, NOT from the JWT.

SERVICES (backend/app/services/users.py): serialize_user (users.py:25-50) is the canonical user→dict used by /me and exposes is_admin/is_venue_owner. authenticate_user (users.py:202-206): lookup by identifier (email if contains "@", else username, lowercased), fails if no hashed_password (google-only accounts can't password-login), bcrypt verify. OTP flows: create_signup_otp (users.py:72-87) and create_password_reset_otp (users.py:90-103) invalidate prior unconsumed OTPs, 10-minute expiry, 5-attempt cap enforced in reset_password_with_otp (users.py:106-129) / consume_signup_otp (users.py:132-165).

SEED DATA (backend/seed_all.py:40-56): seeds a super-admin user (is_admin=True) and a venue-owner user (is_venue_owner=True) via get_or_create_user.","keyFacts":["Auth = JWT HS256 (python-jose), payload only {sub: str(user.id), exp}; no role claims in token — roles must be fetched from GET /api/auth/me (security.py:21-24, auth.py:42-43)","Roles are boolean columns on users: is_admin (super admin), is_venue_owner (turf owner), is_verified, is_active; plus per-tournament TournamentAdmin rows for match admins (models/user.py:41-45, admin.py:62-69)","Turf-owner gating pattern: routes Depends(get_current_user) then call _require_venue_staff(user) which 403s unless user.is_venue_owner or user.is_admin (admin.py:57-59); there is NO FastAPI admin dependency in deps.py — replicate the hel

notifications GET /api/notifications?unread_only=true (:233-234), markNotificationsRead POST /api/notifications/read (:235-236); venueReviews GET /api/reviews?venue_id= (:239), submitReview POST /api/reviews (:240-241). Types: Venue (ccApi.ts:53-61) {id,name,slug,description,logo_url,cover_url,phone,email,website,address_line1,city,state,postal_code,lat,lng,is_verified,is_active,listings?}; VenueListing (:42-51) {id,venue_id,category:Category,title,description,rules,capacity,price_per_hour,price_per_session,duration_minutes,is_bookable,is_tournament_eligible,is_active,photos:VenuePhoto[],amenities:string[]}; VenuePhoto (:40) {id,url,caption,sort_order}; Booking (:63-67) {id,listing_id,booking_date,start_time,end_time,status,payment_status,num_players}; Category (:36-38) {id,slug,name,type('physical'|'esports'|...),icon_url}; Review (:118-128); Tournament (:90-99) with entry_fee_paise/prize_pool_paise; LeaderboardRow (:84-88); Match/MatchParticipant (:69-82).

TURF BROWSE (frontend/src/pages/TurfBrowsePage.tsx): fetches Promise.all([ccApi.venues(), ccApi.categories()]) on mount (:80-98), then Promise.allSettled(vs.map(v => ccApi.venueListings(v.id))) to build Record<venueId, VenueListing[]> (:86-94). Sport filter chips from categories where type==='physical'||'esports' (:101); city filter via useCity().matchesCity(v.city) (:104); sport filter keeps venues having a listing with category.slug===selectedSport && is_active (:107-114). Auto-sets c
--- keyFacts:
 * Auth token is stored in localStorage under key 'cc_token'; both api.ts:14 and ccApi.ts:17 read it and inject 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' on every request
 * API base URL: import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL ?? 'http://127.0.0.1:8000' (api.ts:1, ccApi.ts:7); errors surface as ApiError(status, body.detail)
 * Login: POST /api/auth/login {identifier, password} → {access_token}; AuthContext.setToken stores token then GET /api/auth/me populates user (AuthContext.tsx:29-57); UserRead has is_admin AND is_venue_owner flags (api.ts:61,63)
 * A turf-owner portal ALREADY EXISTS at /staff/venue → pages/staff/TurfOwnerPage.tsx (App.tsx:55), gated by user.is_venue_owner || user.is_admin, with tabs overview/listings/bookings/tournaments backed by GET /api/staff/my-venue and GET /api/staff/my-tournaments
 * Route guards: RequireAuth redirects to /login?next=; RequireAdmin checks user.is_admin and redirects to /admin/login?next= (AuthGuards.tsx:6-32); staff pages do their own imperative guard + redirect to /staff-login
 * Public turf flow: /turf → TurfBrowsePage (ccApi.venues() + ccApi.categories() + per-venue ccApi.venueListings()), /venue/:id → VenueDetailPage (ccApi.venue + ccApi.venueListings + ccApi.venueReviews); TurfDetailPage.tsx is legacy, unrouted, uses local PlatformContext demo data
 * Owner-side write endpoints already in ccApi.ts: createVenue POST /api/venues, updateVenue PUT /api/venues/{id}, addListing POST /api/venues/{id}/listings, uploadListingPhoto POST /api/listings/{id}/photos (multipart, ?sort_order&caption), setAmenities POST /api/listings/{id}/amenities (body: string[]), addSlot POST /api/listings/{id}/slots, venueBookings GET /api/venues/{id}/bookings (ccApi.ts:142
 * Prices are stored in paise: price_per_hour/price_per_session on VenueListing, rendered as ₹{value/100} '/ hr' or '/ session', 0 → 'Free' (VenueDetailPage.tsx:42-46); tournaments use entry_fee_paise/prize_pool_paise
 * VenueListing shape: {id, venue_id, category{slug,name,type}, title, description, rules, capacity, price_per_hour, price_per_session, duration_minutes, is_bookable, is_tournament_eligible, is_active, photos[{id,url,caption,sort_order}], amenities: string[]} (ccApi.ts:42-51); Venue shape includes logo_url, cover_url, lat/lng (strings), is_verified, is_active (ccApi.ts:53-61)
 * Image URLs may be relative; pages prefix with BASE via imgSrc() helper (TurfBrowsePage.tsx:11-14, VenueDetailPage.tsx:37-40); missing photos fall back to hardcoded Unsplash sport images keyed by category slug
 * Public detail page has NO online slot booking — CTA is 'Send Inquiry' (InquiryModal) or tel: call; Booking type exists {listing_id, booking_date, start_time, end_time, status, payment_status, num_players} with POST /api/bookings and GET /api/bookings/me (ccApi.ts:63-67,165-167)
 * ccApi.req skips the JSON Content-Type header when body is FormData (ccApi.ts:18-20) — needed for photo uploads; api.ts request always sets application/json
 * Legacy /admin panel (RequireAdmin, AdminLayout) coexists with newer full-screen staff portals (/staff-login, /staff/admin, /staff/venue, /staff/match) which render without PublicLayout navbar (App.tsx:52-56, 97-107)
==================== design-language ====================
STYLING APPROACH: No Tailwind, no CSS modules, no styled-components. One giant global stylesheet frontend/src/index.css (8040 lines) with plain BEM-ish class names + CSS custom properties defined on :root (index.css:3-43). Components are TSX applying className strings; occasional inline style={{}} for one-off spacing (e.g. TurfBrowsePage.tsx:148, 194). Vite + React 18 + react-router 7; framer-motion ^10.16.16 used only on landing-page sections (package.json). No tailwind.config exists in frontend/.

COLOR PALETTE (index.css:3-43): backgrounds --navy-deep:#060d1a, --navy:#0a1628, --navy-soft:#0f1f35; body bg = linear-gradient(185deg,#060d1a 0%,#0a1628 45%,#060d1a 100%) (index.css:66). Accent cyan/teal: --accent:#0abfbc, --accent-dim:#087f7d, --accent-bright:#1de9e6, --accent-glow:rgba(10,191,188,0.28). Legacy aliases --gold:#0abfbc, --silver:#e0f7f7, --silver-muted:#a0d4d4 still used everywhere. Text: --text:#e8f4f4, --text-muted:rgba(200,235,235,0.65), --stroke:rgba(10,191,188,0.22). --glass:rgba(6,13,26,0.85), --shadow:0 24px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.7), --radius:18px, --radius-sm:12px. Gradients: --gradient-mix:linear-gradient(135deg,#1de9e6 0%,#0abfbc 48%,#087f7d 100%); --gradient-mix-soft. Status/semantic colors used ad hoc: success #4ade80, error #f87171, warn/prize #facc15, purple #a78bfa, blue #38bdf8, orange #fb923c (index.css:5588-5591, 4006-4024, 5861-5865).

TYPOGRAPHY: Google Fonts import (index.css:1) — 'Newsreader' serif (--font, used for display headings/modal titles, e.g. .auth-card__title index.css:3904, .signin-modal h2 index.css:851) and 'DM Sans' (--font-body, body default index.css:64). Section h1/h2: clamp(28px,3.5vw,40px), weight 800, letter-spacing -0.02em, color var(--silver) (index.css:3269-3275). Eyebrow/kicker pattern: 11-12px, weight 700, letter-spacing 0.1-0.2em, uppercase, color var(--gold) (index.css:512-519).

THEME: dark-only. No light theme, no prefers-color-scheme, no theme toggle. html background hardcoded #060d1a (index.css:55). Fixed decorative layers: .noise SVG-turbulence overlay opacity .04 (index.css:84-92), .app-aurora blurred radial teal blobs animating 19-26s (index.css:120-176), optional canvas particle field .cc-bg-canvas from components/ui/InteractiveBackground.tsx.

GLASSMORPHISM: yes, heavily on the public site. Navbar 'liquid glass' bar .site-header-glass: rgba(7,14,26,0.62) + top-sheen gradient, backdrop-filter blur(30px) saturate(1.9), border 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.14), inset highlight shadows, radius 20px (index.css:193-213). Modal .model-dialog: rgba(10,15,28,0.92), blur(44px), radius 24px, dialog-pop-in 0.32s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1) scale(0.92)→1 (index.css:1123-1151).

BUTTONS (index.css:632-689): .btn = inline-flex, padding 12px 22px, radius 8px, font-body 15px/600. .btn-primary = bg var(--accent) #0abfbc, color #060d1a (dark text on cyan), box-shadow 0 0 20px rgba(10,191,188,0.3); hover → --accent-bright + glow 0.45. .btn-secondary = transparent, border rgba(255,255,255,0.5), white text. .btn-ghost = rgba(25,25,25,0.65) bg, border rgba(255,255,255,0.12). .btn-sm = 8px 14px/12px. Wrapper component components/ui/Button.tsx maps variant prop → these classes.

CARDS: generic .card (index.css:1416-1433): padding clamp(24px,3vw,32px), radius var(--radius-sm)=12px, bg rgba(16,16,16,0.9), border 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.1), hover → border rgba(255,255,255,0.2). Newer teal-tinted 'v2' card language (venue cards, index.css:5960-5974): bg rgba(10,22,40,0.92), border 1px rgba(10,191,188,0.12), radius var(--radius)=18px, hover → border rgba(10,191,188,0.4), box-shadow 0 8px 32px rgba(10,191,188,0.15), transform translateY(-2px); cover img scale(1.04) on hover (index.css:5982-5983). Pill badges: radius 999px, 11px/700, tinted bg 0.12-0.18 alpha + matching 0.3-0.4 border (e.g. venue-card-v2__verified index.css:5985-5992).

CHIPS/FILTERS: .sport-chip (index.css:5928-5956): pill radius 999px, bg rgba(10,191,188,0.06), border rgba(10,191,188,0.15), 13px/500; --active: bg 0.18, border var(--accent), color var(--accent-bright), weight 700, glow 0 0 12px rgba(10,191,188,0.2).

FORMS: .auth-input (index.css:3962-3983): padding 11px 14px, bg rgba(255,255,255,0.05), border 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.14), radius 10px, focus → border rgba(255,255,255,0.4) + bg 0.07; placeholder rgba(245,245,245,0.3). Error/success banners .auth-error/.auth-success (index.css:4006-4024): #f87171 / #4ade80 text on 0.08-alpha tinted bg with 0.2-alpha border, radius 8px.

SKELETONS: rgba(255,255,255,0.04) bg + border 0.07, radius var(--radius), animation skeleton-pulse 1.6s ease-in-out infinite; @keyframes skeleton-pulse opacity .5↔1 (index.css:4508-4511, 5529).

FRAMER-MOTION PATTERN (only on landing sections, e.g. components/sections/TurfSection.tsx:6-13): <motion.section initial={{opacity:0,y:40}} whileInView={{opacity:1,y:0}} viewport={{once:true,margin:'-80px'}} transition={{duration:0.6,ease:[0.22,1,0.36,1]}}>. CSS easing house style: cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) and (0.16,1,0.3,1); transitions 0.15-0.2s for hover states. prefers-reduced-motion honored (index.css:1014, 1680).

TWO ADMIN DESIGN SYSTEMS EXIST — both are FLAT NEUTRAL DARK (no glass, no teal, system-ui-ish), intentionally plainer than the public site:
(1) '.admin-*' (used by layouts/AdminLayout.tsx + pages/admin/* + components/ui/Sidebar.tsx AdminSidebar): .admin-shell grid 240px 1fr, bg #0a0a0c, color #e8eaef, font-family system-ui (index.css:3642-3649). Sidebar bg #060608, links padding 10px 12px radius 8px color #9ca3af, hover/.is-active bg rgba(255,255,255,0.08) color #fff (index.css:3651-3698). Topbar bg #0e0e12 border-bottom rgba(255,255,255,0.08) (index.css:3706-3713). Content padding 24px. Page pattern (AdminDashboardPage.tsx:7-38): <div className="admin-page"><h1>…</h1><p className="muted">…</p>. Stats: .admin-stat-grid repeat(3,1fr) gap 12px; .admin-stat padding 16px radius 10px bg #141418 border rgba(255,255,255,0.06); __value 28px/800; __label 12px #9ca3af (index.css:3736-3759). Inputs .admin-input: bg #141418, border rgba(255,255,255,0.12), radius 8px (index.css:3784-3792). Login .admin-login__panel: min(400px,100%), bg #101014, radius 12px (index.css:3814-3820). Collapses to 1 column at 900px (index.css:3840-3859).
(2) '.staff-*' (used by pages/staff/* incl. the EXISTING TurfOwnerPage.tsx at /staff/venue — 'Venue Portal'): .staff-shell grid 220px 1fr bg #000 (index.css:5766-5771); sidebar #080808 sticky 100vh; .staff-nav-btn 9px 12px radius 8px color rgba(245,245,245,0.65), --active bg rgba(255,255,255,0.1) #fff 700, --logout #f87171 (index.css:5808-5827). .staff-main padding clamp(24px,4vw,40px). .staff-section max-width 960px; .staff-h2 22px/700; .staff-stat-card padding 20px radius 14px bg rgba(255,255,255,0.04) border rgba(255,255,255,0.1), __value 32px/800, __label 12px uppercase 0.08em (index.css:5845-5849). Tables: .staff-table-wrap overflow-x auto radius 12px bordered; th 11px/700 uppercase 0.1em bg rgba(255,255,255,0.03); td 12px 14px border-bottom rgba(255,255,255,0.05); ro
--- keyFacts:
 * Styling = single global CSS file frontend/src/index.css (8040 lines) with CSS variables + BEM-ish classes; NO Tailwind, no CSS modules; occasional inline style={{marginTop:N}}
 * A turf-owner panel ALREADY EXISTS: pages/staff/TurfOwnerPage.tsx ('Venue Portal', /staff/venue) using the .staff-* class system (index.css:5737-5914) — new turf-owner admin pages should reuse .staff-shell / .staff-sidebar / .staff-nav-btn / .staff-main / .staff-section / .staff-h2 / .staff-stats-grid / .staff-stat-card / .staff-table-wrap / .staff-table / .staff-badge--* / .staff-action-btn / .sta
 * Admin shells are FLAT NEUTRAL DARK (bg #000/#0a0a0c, white-alpha borders rgba(255,255,255,0.06-0.12), no glass/teal) — deliberately plainer than the glassy teal public site; a second system .admin-* (index.css:3642-3868) backs layouts/AdminLayout.tsx + pages/admin/*
 * Core tokens (index.css:3-43): bg #060d1a/#0a1628, accent #0abfbc (--accent), bright #1de9e6, dim #087f7d, text #e8f4f4, muted rgba(200,235,235,0.65), --radius:18px, --radius-sm:12px, pill radius 999px
 * Fonts: 'DM Sans' (--font-body, everything) + 'Newsreader' serif (--font, display headings only); admin/staff shells override to system-ui (index.css:3648)
 * Buttons: .btn .btn-primary (cyan #0abfbc bg, dark #060d1a text, glow shadow 0 0 20px rgba(10,191,188,0.3)), .btn-secondary (outline white), .btn-ghost, .btn-sm — wrapped by components/ui/Button.tsx
 * Semantic colors: success #4ade80, error #f87171, warning/highlight #facc15, purple #a78bfa — always rendered as tinted pill/banner: color X on rgba(X,0.08-0.15) bg + rgba(X,0.2-0.3) 1px border, radius 8px or 999px
 * Public-site card hover formula: border-color→rgba(10,191,188,0.4), box-shadow 0 8px 32px rgba(10,191,188,0.15), translateY(-2px), transitions 0.15-0.2s (index.css:5960-5974)
 * Form inputs: .auth-input (public) bg rgba(255,255,255,0.05) border rgba(255,255,255,0.14) radius 10px; .admin-input bg #141418 radius 8px; error/success via .auth-error/.auth-success
 * framer-motion v10 installed but only used on landing sections; house pattern: initial={{opacity:0,y:40}} whileInView={{opacity:1,y:0}} viewport={{once:true,margin:'-80px'}} transition={{duration:0.6,ease:[0.22,1,0.36,1]}} (components/sections/TurfSection.tsx:6-13); admin/staff pages use NO motion
 * Loading skeletons: bg rgba(255,255,255,0.04), border rgba(255,255,255,0.07), animation skeleton-pulse 1.6s (opacity .5↔1, index.css:4508)
 * Dark theme only — no light mode, no prefers-color-scheme, html bg hardcoded #060d1a

lastPrompt: I want you to create a admin panle from where an Admin can list their Turfs and make appropriate changes. Turf owners will be the Admins for their Page we need a seperate login for them - and once log…

content.content:
1	==================== frontend-admin ====================
2	AUTH/LOGIN: Both admin and staff logins use the same backend endpoint POST /api/auth/login with body {identifier, password} returning {access_token, token_type} (frontend/src/lib/api.ts:99-103, 38-41). Base URL = import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL ?? 'http://127.0.0.1:8000' (api.ts:1). Token is stored in localStorage under key 'cc_token' via AuthContext.setToken (frontend/src/context/AuthContext.tsx:53), which then fetches GET /api/auth/me (api.ts:127) into user state. UserRead includes is_admin and is_venue_owner booleans (api.ts:61,63). isAdmin = user?.is_admin ?? false (AuthContext.tsx:72). signOut removes 'cc_token' (AuthContext.tsx:59-62). 401 on /me also removes 'cc_token' (AuthContext.tsx:34-37). AdminLoginPage (frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminLoginPage.tsx:34-35) calls api.login then setToken; redirects to ?next= param but only if it starts with '/admin', else '/admin' (lines 7-10, 23-25).
3	
4	ROUTE GUARDS: RequireAdmin (frontend/src/routes/AuthGuards.tsx:23-32) — if loading show spinner; if !user || !isAdmin, Navigate to /admin/login?next=<pathname>. It relies solely on user.is_admin from the backend /api/auth/me, NOT Firestore. frontend/src/lib/adminAccess.ts:9-21 (isFirestoreAdmin, checks Firestore doc admins/{uid} => {role:'admin', enabled:true}) is a legacy Firebase-based check NOT referenced by RequireAdmin or any route — dead/legacy code. Routing (frontend/src/App.tsx:97-107): '/admin/login' unguarded; <Route element={<RequireAdmin><AdminLayout/></RequireAdmin>}> wraps /admin (AdminDashboardPage), /admin/turfs, /admin/tournaments, /admin/leaderboard, /admin/users, /admin/content, /admin/activity — commented "Old admin panel (legacy)" (App.tsx:97). Staff routes (App.tsx:52-56) /staff-login, /staff/admin, /staff/venue, /staff/match are registered OUTSIDE any layout/guard component; each staff page self-guards in useEffect: SuperAdminPage.tsx:38-43 (!user → /staff-login, !user.is_admin → /staff/venue), TurfOwnerPage.tsx:48-50 & 59 (!user → /staff-login; !is_venue_owner && !is_admin → /staff/match), MatchAdminPage.tsx:44-45 (!user → /staff-login only).
5	
6	ADMIN LAYOUT/NAV: AdminLayout (frontend/src/layouts/AdminLayout.tsx) = .admin-shell with <AdminSidebar/> + .admin-main containing topbar (user email + Sign out → signOut() + navigate('/')) and <Outlet/>. AdminSidebar (frontend/src/components/ui/Sidebar.tsx:3-10) links: /admin (Dashboard, end), /admin/turfs (Turfs & Slots), /admin/tournaments, /admin/leaderboard, /admin/users (Users & Teams), /admin/content, plus 'Exit to site' → /. Note sidebar has NO link to /admin/activity though the route exists. AdminDashboardPage (frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboardPage.tsx) shows counts from usePlatform() context (turfs/tournaments/bookings — local state) and quick links.
7	
8	ADMINTURFSPAGE CAPABILITIES: frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminTurfsPage.tsx makes ZERO API calls. It reads {turfs, setTurfs} from usePlatform() (PlatformContext, local client state) and its only operation is toggleSlot (lines 6-19) flipping slot.isBooked in memory and setting bookedByEmail='admin@championcircuit.com'. No create/edit/delete of turfs, no backend persistence; comment line 24: "Shared catalog (local + future Firestore collection)". It is display+toggle of mock/local data only.
9	
10	STAFF PAGES (the real backend-connected portals): (1) StaffLoginPage (/staff-login, frontend/src/pages/staff/StaffLoginPage.tsx) — hidden login (not linked publicly), api.login → setToken('cc_token'); after user loads redirects: is_admin → /staff/admin, is_venue_owner → /staff/venue, else /staff/match (lines 41-51). (2) SuperAdminPage (/staff/admin, frontend/src/pages/staff/SuperAdminPage.tsx) — sidebar-tab shell (.staff-shell/.staff-sidebar/.staff-main) with tabs dashboard/users/venues/tournaments/news/vouchers/activity; own adminReq() fetch helper reading localStorage 'cc_token' (lines 10-26). Calls: GET /api/admin/stats (:83), GET /api/admin/users?search=&limit=100 (:115), PUT /api/admin/users/{id}/password {new_password} (:122), PUT /api/admin/users/{id} {is_active} ban/unban (:129), POST /api/admin/users create (with is_venue_owner checkbox) (:137,158), GET /api/admin/venues (:196), POST /api/admin/venues/{id}/verify (:200), POST /api/admin/venues/{id}/suspend (:204), POST /api/admin/tournaments/{tId}/assign-match-admin {username} (:247), PUT /api/tournaments/{tId} {status: draft|registration|live|completed|cancelled} (:254), GET /api/news?category= (:298), ccApi.createNews/ccApi.publishNews, voucherApi.browse (read-only vouchers list). Reuses admin ActivityLogPage. (3) TurfOwnerPage (/staff/venue, frontend/src/pages/staff/TurfOwnerPage.tsx) — 'Venue Portal' sidebar shell with tabs overview/listings/bookings/tournaments; own staffReq() helper reading 'cc_token' (lines 13-29, FormData-aware). Calls: GET /api/staff/my-venue → {venue, listings, bookings} (:52), GET /api/staff/my-tournaments (:53), ccApi.categories() GET /api/categories (:136), ccApi.addListing → POST /api/venues/{venueId}/listings (:141; ccApi.ts:146-147) with form {category_id,title,description,capacity,price_per_hour(paise; UI multiplies rupees×100 :165),duration_minutes,is_bookable,is_tournament_eligible}, POST /api/admin/tournaments/{tId}/assign-match-admin {username} (:226). Bookings tab = read-only table (date/time/listing_id/user_id/status). Overview shows venue name/city/address_line1/phone/is_verified. No venue-create UI — links to /api/docs#/venues/create_my_venue_api_venues_post (:109). Admins can also access it and get a '← Super Admin' back-link (:77-81). (4) MatchAdminPage (/staff/match, frontend/src/pages/staff/MatchAdminPage.tsx) — for users assigned as match admin: ccApi.tournaments() list, GET /api/staff/tournaments/{id}/participants (:58), GET /api/staff/tournaments/{id}/matches (:59), POST /api/staff/matches/{id}/verify (award points, :127), PUT /api/staff/matches/{id} edit scores (:133), ccApi.createMatch record match with participants[{user_id,result,score,team,role}] (:283-297). Tabs: participants/matches/record.
11	
12	ADDITIONAL ccApi VENUE METHODS available but unused by TurfOwnerPage (frontend/src/lib/ccApi.ts:134-162): createVenue POST /api/venues, updateVenue PUT /api/venues/{id}, venueListings GET /api/venues/{id}/listings, uploadListingPhoto POST /api/listings/{id}/photos?sort_order=&caption= (multipart), setAmenities POST /api/listings/{id}/amenities, addSlot POST /api/listings/{id}/slots, venueBookings GET /api/venues/{id}/bookings.
13	--- keyFacts:
14	 * Single auth for everyone: POST /api/auth/login {identifier,password} -> {access_token}; token stored in localStorage key 'cc_token' (frontend/src/lib/api.ts:99-103, frontend/src/context/AuthContext.tsx:53); role flags come from GET /api/auth/me (is_admin, is_venue_owner in UserRead, api.ts:61,63)
15	 * There are TWO admin UIs: legacy /admin/* (RequireAdmin + AdminLayout, mostly local/mock data, App.tsx:97-107) and the real backend-connected staff portals at /staff-login, /staff/admin, /staff/venue, /staff/match (App.tsx:52-56, no shared layout, each page self-guards via useEffect)
16	 * The turf-owner panel already exists: frontend/src/pages/staff/TurfOwnerPage.tsx (/staff/venue) — guard is user.is_venue_owner || user.is_admin (line 50,59), redirects unauthenticated users to /staff-login
17	 * TurfOwnerPage data endpoints: GET /api/staff/my-venue -> {venue, listings, bookings}; GET /api/staff/my-tournaments; POST /api/venues/{venueId}/listings (create listing via ccApi.addListing); POST /api/admin/tournaments/{tId}/assign-match-admin {username}; GET /api/categories for the category dropdown
18	 * price_per_hour is stored in paise — the listing form multiplies rupee input by 100 (TurfOwnerPage.tsx:165) and displays price_per_hour/100 (:178)
19	 * Staff pages each define their own fetch helper (staffReq/adminReq) duplicating api.ts: reads localStorage 'cc_token', sets Authorization: Bearer, JSON unless body is FormData, throws ApiError(status, body.detail) — copy this pattern or reuse it (TurfOwnerPage.tsx:13-29, SuperAdminPage.tsx:10-26)
20	 * API base URL everywhere: import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL ?? 'http://127.0.0.1:8000'

Then await setToken(res.access_token) and navigate(next) where next comes from ?next= query param sanitized by safeNext (LoginPage.tsx:6-9: must start with '/' and not '//'). AuthContext (frontend/src/context/AuthContext.tsx): setToken (AuthContext.tsx:51-57) stores token in localStorage key 'cc_token' then fetchMe(); fetchMe (AuthContext.tsx:29-39) calls api.me() → GET /api/auth/me (api.ts:127), on 401 removes 'cc_token' and clears user. Mount effect (AuthContext.tsx:42-49) loads user if token exists; signOut (AuthContext.tsx:59-62) removes 'cc_token'. Context value: {user, loading, isAdmin: user?.is_admin ?? false, setToken, signOut, refreshUser} (AuthContext.tsx:68-78); hook useAuth (AuthContext.tsx:83-87). UserRead fields (api.ts:43-67) include is_admin, is_venue_owner, is_verified, city, username, email, avatar_url etc. Guards (frontend/src/routes/AuthGuards.tsx): RequireAuth (:6-15) redirects to /login?next=<pathname+search>; RequireAdmin (:23-32) checks isAdmin (user.is_admin) and redirects to /admin/login?next=; RequireRegistered (:19-21) aliases RequireAuth; RedirectIfAuthed (:34-39). 35	--- keyFacts:
36	 * Auth token is stored in localStorage under key 'cc_token'; both api.ts:14 and ccApi.ts:17 read it and inject 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' on every request
37	 * API base URL: import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL ?? 'http://127.0.0.1:8000' (api.ts:1, ccApi.ts:7); errors surface as ApiError(status, body.detail)
38	 * Login: POST /api/auth/login {identifier, password} → {access_token}; AuthContext.setToken stores token then GET /api/auth/me populates user (AuthContext.tsx:29-57); UserRead has is_admin AND is_venue_owner flags (api.ts:61,63)
39	 * A turf-owner portal ALREADY EXISTS at /staff/venue → pages/staff/TurfOwnerPage.tsx (App.tsx:55), gated by user.is_venue_owner || user.is_admin, with tabs overview/listings/bookings/tournaments backed by GET /api/staff/my-venue and GET /api/staff/my-tournaments
40	 * Route guards: RequireAuth redirects to /login?next=; RequireAdmin checks user.is_admin and redirects to /admin/login?next= (AuthGuards.tsx:6-32); staff pages do their own imperative guard + redirect to /staff-login
41	 * Public turf flow: /turf → TurfBrowsePage (ccApi.venues() + ccApi.categories() + per-venue ccApi.venueListings()), /venue/:id → VenueDetailPage (ccApi.venue + ccApi.venueListings + ccApi.venueReviews); TurfDetailPage.tsx is legacy, unrouted, uses local PlatformContext demo data
42	 * Owner-side write endpoints already in ccApi.ts: createVenue POST /api/venues, updateVenue PUT /api/venues/{id}, addListing POST /api/venues/{id}/listings, uploadListingPhoto POST /api/listings/{id}/photos (multipart, ?sort_order&caption), setAmenities POST /api/listings/{id}/amenities (body: string[]), addSlot POST /api/listings/{id}/slots, venueBookings GET /api/venues/{id}/bookings (ccApi.ts:142
43	 * Prices are stored in paise: price_per_hour/price_per_session on VenueListing, rendered as ₹{value/100} '/ hr' or '/ session', 0 → 'Free' (VenueDetailPage.tsx:42-46); tournaments use entry_fee_paise/prize_pool_paise
44	 * VenueListing shape: {id, venue_id, category{slug,name,type}, title, description, rules, capacity, price_per_hour, price_per_session, duration_minutes, is_bookable, is_tournament_eligible, is_active, photos[{id,url,caption,sort_order}], amenities: string[]} (ccApi.ts:42-51); Venue shape includes logo_url, cover_url, lat/lng (strings), is_verified, is_active (ccApi.ts:53-61)
45	 * Image URLs may be relative; pages prefix with BASE via imgSrc() helper (TurfBrowsePage.tsx:11-14, VenueDetailPage.tsx:37-40); missing photos fall back to hardcoded Unsplash sport images keyed by category slug
46	 * Public detail page has NO online slot booking — CTA is 'Send Inquiry' (InquiryModal) or tel: call; Booking type exists {listing_id, booking_date, start_time, end_time, status, payment_status, num_players} with POST /api/bookings and GET /api/bookings/me (ccApi.ts:63-67,165-167)
47	 * ccApi.req skips the JSON Content-Type header when body is FormData (ccApi.ts:18-20) — needed for photo uploads; api.ts request always sets application/json
48	 * Legacy /admin panel (RequireAdmin, AdminLayout) coexists with newer full-screen staff portals (/staff-login, /staff/admin, /staff/venue, /staff/match) which render without PublicLayout navbar (App.tsx:52-56, 97-107)
49	==================== design-language ====================
50	STYLING APPROACH: No Tailwind, no CSS modules, no styled-components. One giant global stylesheet frontend/src/index.css (8040 lines) with plain BEM-ish class names + CSS custom properties defined on :root (index.css:3-43). Components are TSX applying className strings; occasional inline style={{}} for one-off spacing (e.g. TurfBrowsePage.tsx:148, 194). Vite + React 18 + react-router 7; framer-motion ^10.16.16 used only on landing-page sections (package.json). No tailwind.config exists in frontend/.
51	
52	COLOR PALETTE (index.css:3-43): backgrounds --navy-deep:#060d1a, --navy:#0a1628, --navy-soft:#0f1f35; body bg = linear-gradient(185deg,#060d1a 0%,#0a1628 45%,#060d1a 100%) (index.css:66). Accent cyan/teal: --accent:#0abfbc, --accent-dim:#087f7d, --accent-bright:#1de9e6, --accent-glow:rgba(10,191,188,0.28). Legacy aliases --gold:#0abfbc, --silver:#e0f7f7, --silver-muted:#a0d4d4 still used everywhere. Text: --text:#e8f4f4, --text-muted:rgba(200,235,235,0.65), --stroke:rgba(10,191,188,0.22). --glass:rgba(6,13,26,0.85), --shadow:0 24px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.7), --radius:18px, --radius-sm:12px. Gradients: --gradient-mix:linear-gradient(135deg,#1de9e6 0%,#0abfbc 48%,#087f7d 100%); --gradient-mix-soft. Status/semantic colors used ad hoc: success #4ade80, error #f87171, warn/prize #facc15, purple #a78bfa, blue #38bdf8, orange #fb923c (index.css:5588-5591, 4006-4024, 5861-5865).
53	
54	TYPOGRAPHY: Google Fonts import (index.css:1) — 'Newsreader' serif (--font, used for display headings/modal titles, e.g. .auth-card__title index.css:3904, .signin-modal h2 index.css:851) and 'DM Sans' (--font-body, body default index.css:64). Section h1/h2: clamp(28px,3.5vw,40px), weight 800, letter-spacing -0.02em, color var(--silver) (index.css:3269-3275). Eyebrow/kicker pattern: 11-12px, weight 700, letter-spacing 0.1-0.2em, uppercase, color var(--gold) (index.css:512-519).

Fixed decorative layers: .noise SVG-turbulence overlay opacity .04 (index.css:84-92), .app-aurora blurred radial teal blobs animating 19-26s (index.css:120-176), optional canvas particle field .cc-bg-canvas from components/ui/InteractiveBackground.tsx.

Navbar 'liquid glass' bar .site-header-glass: rgba(7,14,26,0.62) + top-sheen gradient, backdrop-filter blur(30px) saturate(1.9), border 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.14), inset highlight shadows, radius 20px (index.css:193-213). Modal .model-dialog: rgba(10,15,28,0.92), blur(44px), radius 24px, dialog-pop-in 0.32s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1) scale(0.92)→1 (index.css:1123-1151).

Newer teal-tinted 'v2' card language (venue cards, index.css:5960-5974): bg rgba(10,22,40,0.92), border 1px rgba(10,191,188,0.12), radius var(--radius)=18px, hover → border rgba(10,191,188,0.4), box-shadow 0 8px 32px rgba(10,191,188,0.15), transform translateY(-2px); cover img scale(1.04) on hover (index.css:5982-5983).
