89	 * Table recipe to copy: <div className='staff-table-wrap'><table className='staff-table'> — th: 11px/700 uppercase letter-spacing .1em bg rgba(255,255,255,0.03); td: 12px 14px padding, border-bottom rgba(255,255,255,0.05); tr:hover td bg rgba(255,255,255,0.02)
90	 * Stat tile recipe: .staff-stats-grid (auto-fill minmax(160px,1fr) gap 14px) > .staff-stat-card (padding 20px, radius 14px, bg rgba(255,255,255,0.04), border rgba(255,255,255,0.1)) with __icon (emoji 28px), __value (32px/800), __label (12px uppercase muted)
91	 * Icons are emoji throughout (no icon library installed); brand assets at /branding/cc-mark.png and /branding/cc-full.png
92	 * Responsive: .staff-shell collapses grid 220px 1fr → 1fr at 768px with sidebar as horizontal wrap bar; .admin-shell collapses at 900px
93

file.content:
==================== frontend-admin ====================
AUTH/LOGIN: Both admin and staff logins use the same backend endpoint POST /api/auth/login with body {identifier, password} returning {access_token, token_type} (frontend/src/lib/api.ts:99-103, 38-41). Base URL = import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL ?? 'http://127.0.0.1:8000' (api.ts:1). Token is stored in localStorage under key 'cc_token' via AuthContext.setToken (frontend/src/context/AuthContext.tsx:53), which then fetches GET /api/auth/me (api.ts:127) into user state. UserRead includes is_admin and is_venue_owner booleans (api.ts:61,63). isAdmin = user?.is_admin ?? false (AuthContext.tsx:72). signOut removes 'cc_token' (AuthContext.tsx:59-62). 401 on /me also removes 'cc_token' (AuthContext.tsx:34-37). AdminLoginPage (frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminLoginPage.tsx:34-35) calls api.login then setToken; redirects to ?next= param but only if it starts with '/admin', else '/admin' (lines 7-10, 23-25).

ROUTE GUARDS: RequireAdmin (frontend/src/routes/AuthGuards.tsx:23-32) — if loading show spinner; if !user || !isAdmin, Navigate to /admin/login?next=<pathname>. It relies solely on user.is_admin from the backend /api/auth/me, NOT Firestore. frontend/src/lib/adminAccess.ts:9-21 (isFirestoreAdmin, checks Firestore doc admins/{uid} => {role:'admin', enabled:true}) is a legacy Firebase-based check NOT referenced by RequireAdmin or any route — dead/legacy code. Routing (frontend/src/App.tsx:97-107): '/admin/login' unguarded; <Route element={<RequireAdmin><AdminLayout/></RequireAdmin>}> wraps /admin (AdminDashboardPage), /admin/turfs, /admin/tournaments, /admin/leaderboard, /admin/users, /admin/content, /admin/activity — commented "Old admin panel (legacy)" (App.tsx:97). Staff routes (App.tsx:52-56) /staff-login, /staff/admin, /staff/venue, /staff/match are registered OUTSIDE any layout/guard component; each staff page self-guards in useEffect: SuperAdminPage.tsx:38-43 (!user → /staff-login, !user.is_admin → /staff/venue), TurfOwnerPage.tsx:48-50 & 59 (!user → /staff-login; !is_venue_owner && !is_admin → /staff/match), MatchAdminPage.tsx:44-45 (!user → /staff-login only).

ADMIN LAYOUT/NAV: AdminLayout (frontend/src/layouts/AdminLayout.tsx) = .admin-shell with <AdminSidebar/> + .admin-main containing topbar (user email + Sign out → signOut() + navigate('/')) and <Outlet/>. AdminSidebar (frontend/src/components/ui/Sidebar.tsx:3-10) links: /admin (Dashboard, end), /admin/turfs (Turfs & Slots), /admin/tournaments, /admin/leaderboard, /admin/users (Users & Teams), /admin/content, plus 'Exit to site' → /. Note sidebar has NO link to /admin/activity though the route exists. AdminDashboardPage (frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboardPage.tsx) shows counts from usePlatform() context (turfs/tournaments/bookings — local state) and quick links.

ADMINTURFSPAGE CAPABILITIES: frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminTurfsPage.tsx makes ZERO API calls. It reads {turfs, setTurfs} from usePlatform() (PlatformContext, local client state) and its only operation is toggleSlot (lines 6-19) flipping slot.isBooked in memory and setting bookedByEmail='admin@championcircuit.com'. No create/edit/delete of turfs, no backend persistence; comment line 24: "Shared catalog (local + future Firestore collection)". It is display+toggle of mock/local data only.

STAFF PAGES (the real backend-connected portals): (1) StaffLoginPage (/staff-login, frontend/src/pages/staff/StaffLoginPage.tsx) — hidden login (not linked publicly), api.login → setToken('cc_token'); after user loads redirects: is_admin → /staff/admin, is_venue_owner → /staff/venue, else /staff/match (lines 41-51). (2) SuperAdminPage (/staff/admin, frontend/src/pages/staff/SuperAdminPage.tsx) — sidebar-tab shell (.staff-shell/.staff-sidebar/.staff-main) with tabs dashboard/users/venues/tournaments/news/vouchers/activity; own adminReq() fetch helper reading localStorage 'cc_token' (lines 10-26). Calls: GET /api/admin/stats (:83), GET /api/admin/users?search=&limit=100 (:115), PUT /api/admin/users/{id}/password {new_password} (:122), PUT /api/admin/users/{id} {is_active} ban/unban (:129), POST /api/admin/users create (with is_venue_owner checkbox) (:137,158), GET /api/admin/venues (:196), POST /api/admin/venues/{id}/verify (:200), POST /api/admin/venues/{id}/suspend (:204), POST /api/admin/tournaments/{tId}/assign-match-admin {username} (:247), PUT /api/tournaments/{tId} {status: draft|registration|live|completed|cancelled} (:254), GET /api/news?category= (:298), ccApi.createNews/ccApi.publishNews, voucherApi.browse (read-only vouchers list). Reuses admin ActivityLogPage. (3) TurfOwnerPage (/staff/venue, frontend/src/pages/staff/TurfOwnerPage.tsx) — 'Venue Portal' sidebar shell with tabs overview/listings/bookings/tournaments; own staffReq() helper reading 'cc_token' (lines 13-29, FormData-aware). Calls: GET /api/staff/my-venue → {venue, listings, bookings} (:52), GET /api/staff/my-tournaments (:53), ccApi.categories() GET /api/categories (:136), ccApi.addListing → POST /api/venues/{venueId}/listings (:141; ccApi.ts:146-147) with form {category_id,title,description,capacity,price_per_hour(paise; UI multiplies rupees×100 :165),duration_minutes,is_bookable,is_tournament_eligible}, POST /api/admin/tournaments/{tId}/assign-match-admin {username} (:226). Bookings tab = read-only table (date/time/listing_id/user_id/status). Overview shows venue name/city/address_line1/phone/is_verified. No venue-create UI — links to /api/docs#/venues/create_my_venue_api_venues_post (:109). Admins can also access it and get a '← Super Admin' back-link (:77-81). (4) MatchAdminPage (/staff/match, frontend/src/pages/staff/MatchAdminPage.tsx) — for users assigned as match admin: ccApi.tournaments() list, GET /api/staff/tournaments/{id}/participants (:58), GET /api/staff/tournaments/{id}/matches (:59), POST /api/staff/matches/{id}/verify (award points, :127), PUT /api/staff/matches/{id} edit scores (:133), ccApi.createMatch record match with participants[{user_id,result,score,team,role}] (:283-297). Tabs: participants/matches/record.

ADDITIONAL ccApi VENUE METHODS available but unused by TurfOwnerPage (frontend/src/lib/ccApi.ts:134-162): createVenue POST /api/venues, updateVenue PUT /api/venues/{id}, venueListings GET /api/venues/{id}/listings, uploadListingPhoto POST /api/listings/{id}/photos?sort_order=&caption= (multipart), setAmenities POST /api/listings/{id}/amenities, addSlot POST /api/listings/{id}/slots, venueBookings GET /api/venues/{id}/bookings.
--- keyFacts:
 * Single auth for everyone: POST /api/auth/login {identifier,password} -> {access_token}; token stored in localStorage key 'cc_token' (frontend/src/lib/api.ts:99-103, frontend/src/context/AuthContext.tsx:53); role flags come from GET /api/auth/me (is_admin, is_venue_owner in UserRead, api.ts:61,63)
 * There are TWO admin UIs: legacy /admin/* (RequireAdmin + AdminLayout, mostly local/mock data, App.tsx:97-107) and the real backend-connected staff portals at /staff-login, /staff/admin, /staff/venue, /staff/match (App.tsx:52-56, no shared layout, each page self-guards via useEffect)
 * The turf-owner panel already exists: frontend/src/pages/staff/TurfOwnerPage.tsx (/staff/venue) — guard is user.is_venue_owner || user.is_admin (line 50,59), redirects unauthenticated users to /staff-login
 * TurfOwnerPage data endpoints: GET /api/staff/my-venue -> {venue, listings, bookings}; GET /api/staff/my-tournaments; POST /api/venues/{venueId}/listings (create listing via ccApi.addListing); POST /api/admin/tournaments/{tId}/assign-match-admin {username}; GET /api/categories for the category dropdown
 * price_per_hour is stored in paise — the listing form multiplies rupee input by 100 (TurfOwnerPage.tsx:165) and displays price_per_hour/100 (:178)
 * Staff pages each define their own fetch helper (staffReq/adminReq) duplicating api.ts: reads localStorage 'cc_token', sets Authorization: Bearer, JSON unless body is FormData, throws ApiError(status, body.detail) — copy this pattern or reuse it (TurfOwnerPage.tsx:13-29, SuperAdminPage.tsx:10-26)
 * API base URL everywhere: import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL ?? 'http://127.0.0.1:8000'
 * ccApi.ts already has unused venue-owner methods to build on: createVenue POST /api/venues, updateVenue PUT /api/venues/{id}, uploadListingPhoto POST /api/listings/{id}/photos (multipart), setAmenities POST /api/listings/{id}/amenities, addSlot POST /api/listings/{id}/slots, venueBookings GET /api/venues/{id}/bookings (ccApi.ts:142-162)
 * AdminTurfsPage (/admin/turfs) is NOT backend CRUD — it only toggles slot.isBooked in PlatformContext local state (frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminTurfsPage.tsx:6-19); no API calls at all
 * RequireAdmin guard (frontend/src/routes/AuthGuards.tsx:23-32) uses backend is_admin only; lib/adminAccess.ts isFirestoreAdmin (Firestore admins/{uid} doc) is legacy and referenced by no route
 * Staff portal layout conventions: .staff-shell > aside.staff-sidebar (brand img /branding/cc-mark.png, .staff-nav-btn buttons per tab, sign-out button) + main.staff-main with .staff-section, .staff-card, .staff-table, .staff-badge, .staff-create-form classes — follow these for a consistent turf-owner admin panel
 * Venue creation for owners has no UI yet — TurfOwnerPage links to /api/docs#/venues/create_my_venue_api_venues_post when data.venue is null (TurfOwnerPage.tsx:105-113); venue verify/suspend is super-admin only (POST /api/admin/venues/{id}/verify|suspend, SuperAdminPage.tsx:200,204)
 * StaffLoginPage routing after login: is_admin -> /staff/admin, is_venue_owner -> /staff/venue, else -> /staff/match (StaffLoginPage.tsx:41-51)
==================== frontend-app-shell ====================
ROUTE TABLE (frontend/src/App.tsx:44-118, BrowserRouter > AuthProvider > CityProvider > PlatformProvider > Routes): Staff portals, no layout, full-screen (App.tsx:53-56): /staff-login → StaffLoginPage, /staff/admin → SuperAdminPage, /staff/venue → TurfOwnerPage, /staff/match → MatchAdminPage. PublicLayout wrapper (App.tsx:59-87): / (index) → LandingPage, /about → AboutPage, /login → LoginPage, /signup → SignupPage, /register → Navigate to /signup, /forgot-password → ForgotPasswordPage, /turf → TurfBrowsePage, /venue/:id → VenueDetailPage, /esports → EsportsBrowsePage, /esports/tournament/:id → EsportsTournamentPage, /leaderboard → RequireAuth>LeaderboardPage, /vouchers → VouchersPage, /my-voucher → MyVoucherPage, /news → NewsPage, /news/:id → NewsArticlePage. RequireAuth>AppLayout wrapper (App.tsx:90-95): /profile → ProfilePage, /bookings → BookingsPage, /my-matches → MyMatchesPage, /my-vouchers → MyVoucherPage. Legacy admin (App.tsx:98-107): /admin/login → AdminLoginPage; RequireAdmin>AdminLayout wraps /admin → AdminDashboardPage, /admin/turfs → AdminTurfsPage, /admin/tournaments, /admin/leaderboard, /admin/users, /admin/content, /admin/activity. /platform → Navigate /turf (App.tsx:109); * → Navigate / (App.tsx:110). NOTE: TurfDetailPage.tsx is NOT in the route table — /venue/:id uses VenueDetailPage; TurfDetailPage references /turf/:id and /turf/:id/confirm routes that do not exist in App.tsx.

AUTH FLOW: LoginPage (frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx:22-35) calls api.login(identifier.trim(), password) → api.ts:99-103 POST /api/auth/login body {identifier, password} → TokenResponse {access_token, token_type} (api.ts:38-41). Then await setToken(res.access_token) and navigate(next) where next comes from ?next= query param sanitized by safeNext (LoginPage.tsx:6-9: must start with '/' and not '//'). AuthContext (frontend/src/context/AuthContext.tsx): setToken (AuthContext.tsx:51-57) stores token in localStorage key 'cc_token' then fetchMe(); fetchMe (AuthContext.tsx:29-39) calls api.me() → GET /api/auth/me (api.ts:127), on 401 removes 'cc_token' and clears user. Mount effect (AuthContext.tsx:42-49) loads user if token exists; signOut (AuthContext.tsx:59-62) removes 'cc_token'. Context value: {user, loading, isAdmin: user?.is_admin ?? false, setToken, signOut, refreshUser} (AuthContext.tsx:68-78); hook useAuth (AuthContext.tsx:83-87). UserRead fields (api.ts:43-67) include is_admin, is_venue_owner, is_verified, city, username, email, avatar_url etc. Guards (frontend/src/routes/AuthGuards.tsx): RequireAuth (:6-15) redirects to /login?next=<pathname+search>; RequireAdmin (:23-32) checks isAdmin (user.is_admin) and redirects to /admin/login?next=; RequireRegistered (:19-21) aliases RequireAuth; RedirectIfAuthed (:34-39). Other auth endpoints in api.ts: /api/auth/username/{u} check (:81-82), /api/auth/signup/start (:85-89), /api/auth/signup/verify (:92-96), /api/auth/password/forgot (:106-110), /api/auth/password/reset (:113-117), /api/auth/google (:120-124), PUT /api/users/me (:130-143), POST /api/uploads/avatar multipart (:146-161). Separate Firestore-based admin check exists in frontend/src/lib/adminAccess.ts:9-21 (admins/{uid} doc) but AuthGuards use backend is_admin.

API CLIENTS: Both api.ts and ccApi.ts: BASE = import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL ?? 'http://127.0.0.1:8000' (api.ts:1, ccApi.ts:7). api.ts request() (:13-34): always sets Content-Type application/json, injects Authorization: Bearer <localStorage 'cc_token'> if present (:14-19), non-ok → throws ApiError(status, body.detail ?? 'HTTP {status}') (:22-30), 204 → undefined, else res.json(). ccApi.ts req() (:16-32) identical but skips Content-Type when body instanceof FormData (:18-20). Both export an ApiError class {status, message} (api.ts:3-11, ccApi.ts:9-14). ccApi endpoints (ccApi.ts:132-242): categories GET /api/categories (:134); venues GET /api/venues?city= (:137-138); venue GET /api/venues/{id} (:139); venueListings GET /api/venues/{id}/listings (:140); listing GET /api/listings/{id} (:141); createVenue POST /api/venues (:142-143); updateVenue PUT /api/venues/{id} (:144-145); addListing POST /api/venues/{venueId}/listings (:146-147); uploadListingPhoto POST /api/listings/{id}/photos?sort_order=&caption= multipart (:148-155); setAmenities POST /api/listings/{id}/amenities body string[] (:156-159); addSlot POST /api/listings/{id}/slots (:160-161); venueBookings GET /api/venues/{venueId}/bookings (:162); book POST /api/bookings (:165-166); myBookings GET /api/bookings/me (:167); createMatch POST /api/matches (:170-171); matches GET /api/matches?qs (:172-175); match GET /api/matches/{id} (:176); verifyMatch POST /api/matches/{id}/verify (:177-178); myMatches GET /api/matches/me (:179); adjustScore POST /api/scores/adjust (:182-183); userScore GET /api/scores/user/{id} (:184); leaderboard GET /api/leaderboard?scope_type&scope_id&period_type&limit (:187-192); tournaments GET /api/tournaments?status_filter&game&venue_id (:195-200); tournament GET /api/tournaments/{id} (:201); createTournament POST /api/tournaments (:202-203); updateTournament PUT (:204-205); registerTournament POST /api/tournaments/{id}/register?team_id= (:206-210); tournamentResults POST /api/tournaments/{id}/results (:211-212); createTeam POST /api/teams (:215-216); myTeams GET /api/teams/me (:217); inviteToTeam POST /api/teams/{id}/invite?email= (:218-219); news GET /api/news?category= (:222-223), newsArticle (:224), createNews (:225-226), updateNews (:227-228), publishNews POST /api/news/{id}/publish (:229-230); notifications GET /api/notifications?unread_only=true (:233-234), markNotificationsRead POST /api/notifications/read (:235-236); venueReviews GET /api/reviews?venue_id= (:239), submitReview POST /api/reviews (:240-241). Types: Venue (ccApi.ts:53-61) {id,name,slug,description,logo_url,cover_url,phone,email,website,address_line1,city,state,postal_code,lat,lng,is_verified,is_active,listings?}; VenueListing (:42-51) {id,venue_id,category:Category,title,description,rules,capacity,price_per_hour,price_per_session,duration_minutes,is_bookable,is_tournament_eligible,is_active,photos:VenuePhoto[],amenities:string[]}; VenuePhoto (:40) {id,url,caption,sort_order}; Booking (:63-67) {id,listing_id,booking_date,start_time,end_time,status,payment_status,num_players}; Category (:36-38) {id,slug,name,type('physical'|'esports'|...),icon_url}; Review (:118-128); Tournament (:90-99) with entry_fee_paise/prize_pool_paise; LeaderboardRow (:84-88); Match/MatchParticipant (:69-82).

TURF BROWSE (frontend/src/pages/TurfBrowsePage.tsx): fetches Promise.all([ccApi.venues(), ccApi.categories()]) on mount (:80-98), then Promise.allSettled(vs.map(v => ccApi.venueListings(v.id))) to build Record<venueId, VenueListing[]> (:86-94). Sport filter chips from categories where type==='physical'||'esports' (:101); city filter via useCity().matchesCity(v.city) (:104); sport filter keeps venues having a listing with category.slug===selectedSport && is_active (:107-114). Auto-sets c
--- keyFacts:
 * Auth token is stored in localStorage under key 'cc_token'; both api.ts:14 and ccApi.ts:17 read it and inject 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' on every request
 * API base URL: import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL ?? 'http://127.0.0.1:8000' (api.ts:1, ccApi.ts:7); errors surface as ApiError(status, body.detail)
 * Login: POST /api/auth/login {identifier, password} → {access_token}; AuthContext.setToken stores token then GET /api/auth/me populates user (AuthContext.tsx:29-57); UserRead has is_admin AND is_venue_owner flags (api.ts:61,63)
 * A turf-owner portal ALREADY EXISTS at /staff/venue → pages/staff/TurfOwnerPage.tsx (App.tsx:55), gated by user.is_venue_owner || user.is_admin, with tabs overview/listings/bookings/tournaments backed by GET /api/staff/my-venue and GET /api/staff/my-tournaments
 * Route guards: RequireAuth redirects to /login?next=; RequireAdmin checks user.is_admin and redirects to /admin/login?next= (AuthGuards.tsx:6-32); staff pages do their own imperative guard + redirect to /staff-login
 * Public turf flow: /turf → TurfBrowsePage (ccApi.venues() + ccApi.categories() + per-venue ccApi.venueListings()), /venue/:id → VenueDetailPage (ccApi.venue + ccApi.venueListings + ccApi.venueReviews); TurfDetailPage.tsx is legacy, unrouted, uses local PlatformContext demo data
 * Owner-side write endpoints already in ccApi.ts: createVenue POST /api/venues, updateVenue PUT /api/venues/{id}, addListing POST /api/venues/{id}/listings, uploadListingPhoto POST /api/listings/{id}/photos (multipart, ?sort_order&caption), setAmenities POST /api/listings/{id}/amenities (body: string[]), addSlot POST /api/listings/{id}/slots, venueBookings GET /api/venues/{id}/bookings (ccApi.ts:142
 * Prices are stored in paise: price_per_hour/price_per_session on VenueListing, rendered as ₹{value/100} '/ hr' or '/ session', 0 → 'Free' (VenueDetailPage.tsx:42-46); tournaments use entry_fee_paise/prize_pool_paise
 * VenueListing shape: {id, venue_id, category{slug,name,type}, title, description, rules, capacity, price_per_hour, price_per_session, duration_minutes, is_bookable, is_tournament_eligible, is_active, photos[{id,url,caption,sort_order}], amenities: string[]} (ccApi.ts:42-51); Venue shape includes logo_url, cover_url, lat/lng (strings), is_verified, is_active (ccApi.ts:53-61)
 * Image URLs may be relative; pages prefix with BASE via imgSrc() helper (TurfBrowsePage.tsx:11-14, VenueDetailPage.tsx:37-40); missing photos fall back to hardcoded Unsplash sport images keyed by category slug
 * Public detail page has NO online slot booking — CTA is 'Send Inquiry' (InquiryModal) or tel: call; Booking type exists {listing_id, booking_date, start_time, end_time, status, payment_status, num_players} with POST /api/bookings and GET /api/bookings/me (ccApi.ts:63-67,165-167)
 * ccApi.req skips the JSON Content-Type header when body is FormData (ccApi.ts:18-20) — needed for photo uploads; api.ts request always sets application/json
 * Legacy /admin panel (RequireAdmin, AdminLayout) coexists with newer full-screen staff portals (/staff-login, /staff/admin, /staff/venue, /staff/match) which render without PublicLayout navbar (App.tsx:52-56, 97-107)
==================== design-language ====================
STYLING APPROACH: No Tailwind, no CSS modules, no styled-components. One giant global stylesheet frontend/src/index.css (8040 lines) with plain BEM-ish class names + CSS custom properties defined on :root (index.css:3-43). Components are TSX applying className strings; occasional inline style={{}} for one-off spacing (e.g. TurfBrowsePage.tsx:148, 194). Vite + React 18 + react-router 7; framer-motion ^10.16.16 used only on landing-page sections (package.json). No tailwind.config exists in frontend/.

COLOR PALETTE (index.css:3-43): backgrounds --navy-deep:#060d1a, --navy:#0a1628, --navy-soft:#0f1f35; body bg = linear-gradient(185deg,#060d1a 0%,#0a1628 45%,#060d1a 100%) (index.css:66). Accent cyan/teal: --accent:#0abfbc, --accent-dim:#087f7d, --accent-bright:#1de9e6, --accent-glow:rgba(10,191,188,0.28). Legacy aliases --gold:#0abfbc, --silver:#e0f7f7, --silver-muted:#a0d4d4 still used everywhere. Text: --text:#e8f4f4, --text-muted:rgba(200,235,235,0.65), --stroke:rgba(10,191,188,0.22). --glass:rgba(6,13,26,0.85), --shadow:0 24px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.7), --radius:18px, --radius-sm:12px. Gradients: --gradient-mix:linear-gradient(135deg,#1de9e6 0%,#0abfbc 48%,#087f7d 100%); --gradient-mix-soft. Status/semantic colors used ad hoc: success #4ade80, error #f87171, warn/prize #facc15, purple #a78bfa, blue #38bdf8, orange #fb923c (index.css:5588-5591, 4006-4024, 5861-5865).

TYPOGRAPHY: Google Fonts import (index.css:1) — 'Newsreader' serif (--font, used for display headings/modal titles, e.g. .auth-card__title index.css:3904, .signin-modal h2 index.css:851) and 'DM Sans' (--font-body, body default index.css:64). Section h1/h2: clamp(28px,3.5vw,40px), weight 800, letter-spacing -0.02em, color var(--silver) (index.css:3269-3275). Eyebrow/kicker pattern: 11-12px, weight 700, letter-spacing 0.1-0.2em, uppercase, color var(--gold) (index.css:512-519).

THEME: dark-only. No light theme, no prefers-color-scheme, no theme toggle. html background hardcoded #060d1a (index.css:55). Fixed decorative layers: .noise SVG-turbulence overlay opacity .04 (index.css:84-92), .app-aurora blurred radial teal blobs animating 19-26s (index.css:120-176), optional canvas particle field .cc-bg-canvas from components/ui/InteractiveBackground.tsx.

GLASSMORPHISM: yes, heavily on the public site. Navbar 'liquid glass' bar .site-header-glass: rgba(7,14,26,0.62) + top-sheen gradient, backdrop-filter blur(30px) saturate(1.9), border 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.14), inset highlight shadows, radius 20px (index.css:193-213). Modal .model-dialog: rgba(10,15,28,0.92), blur(44px), radius 24px, dialog-pop-in 0.32s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1) scale(0.92)→1 (index.css:1123-1151).

BUTTONS (index.css:632-689): .btn = inline-flex, padding 12px 22px, radius 8px, font-body 15px/600. .btn-primary = bg var(--accent) #0abfbc, color #060d1a (dark text on cyan), box-shadow 0 0 20px rgba(10,191,188,0.3); hover → --accent-bright + glow 0.45. .btn-secondary = transparent, border rgba(255,255,255,0.5), white text. .btn-ghost = rgba(25,25,25,0.65) bg, border rgba(255,255,255,0.12). .btn-sm = 8px 14px/12px. Wrapper component components/ui/Button.tsx maps variant prop → these classes.

CARDS: generic .card (index.css:1416-1433): padding clamp(24px,3vw,32px), radius var(--radius-sm)=12px, bg rgba(16,16,16,0.9), border 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.1), hover → border rgba(255,255,255,0.2). Newer teal-tinted 'v2' card language (venue cards, index.css:5960-5974): bg rgba(10,22,40,0.92), border 1px rgba(10,191,188,0.12), radius var(--radius)=18px, hover → border rgba(10,191,188,0.4), box-shadow 0 8px 32px rgba(10,191,188,0.15), transform translateY(-2px); cover img scale(1.04) on hover (index.css:5982-5983). Pill badges: radius 999px, 11px/700, tinted bg 0.12-0.18 alpha + matching 0.3-0.4 border (e.g. venue-card-v2__verified index.css:5985-5992).

CHIPS/FILTERS: .sport-chip (index.css:5928-5956): pill radius 999px, bg rgba(10,191,188,0.06), border rgba(10,191,188,0.15), 13px/500; --active: bg 0.18, border var(--accent), color var(--accent-bright), weight 700, glow 0 0 12px rgba(10,191,188,0.2).

FORMS: .auth-input (index.css:3962-3983): padding 11px 14px, bg rgba(255,255,255,0.05), border 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.14), radius 10px, focus → border rgba(255,255,255,0.4) + bg 0.07; placeholder rgba(245,245,245,0.3). Error/success banners .auth-error/.auth-success (index.css:4006-4024): #f87171 / #4ade80 text on 0.08-alpha tinted bg with 0.2-alpha border, radius 8px.

SKELETONS: rgba(255,255,255,0.04) bg + border 0.07, radius var(--radius), animation skeleton-pulse 1.6s ease-in-out infinite; @keyframes skeleton-pulse opacity .5↔1 (index.css:4508-4511, 5529).

FRAMER-MOTION PATTERN (only on landing sections, e.g. components/sections/TurfSection.tsx:6-13): <motion.section initial={{opacity:0,y:40}} whileInView={{opacity:1,y:0}} viewport={{once:true,margin:'-80px'}} transition={{duration:0.6,ease:[0.22,1,0.36,1]}}>. CSS easing house style: cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) and (0.16,1,0.3,1); transitions 0.15-0.2s for hover states. prefers-reduced-motion honored (index.css:1014, 1680).

TWO ADMIN DESIGN SYSTEMS EXIST — both are FLAT NEUTRAL DARK (no glass, no teal, system-ui-ish), intentionally plainer than the public site:
(1) '.admin-*' (used by layouts/AdminLayout.tsx + pages/admin/* + components/ui/Sidebar.tsx AdminSidebar): .admin-shell grid 240px 1fr, bg #0a0a0c, color #e8eaef, font-family system-ui (index.css:3642-3649). Sidebar bg #060608, links padding 10px 12px radius 8px color #9ca3af, hover/.is-active bg rgba(255,255,255,0.08) color #fff (index.css:3651-3698). Topbar bg #0e0e12 border-bottom rgba(255,255,255,0.08) (index.css:3706-3713). Content padding 24px. Page pattern (AdminDashboardPage.tsx:7-38): <div className="admin-page"><h1>…</h1><p className="muted">…</p>. Stats: .admin-stat-grid repeat(3,1fr) gap 12px; .admin-stat padding 16px radius 10px bg #141418 border rgba(255,255,255,0.06); __value 28px/800; __label 12px #9ca3af (index.css:3736-3759). Inputs .admin-input: bg #141418, border rgba(255,255,255,0.12), radius 8px (index.css:3784-3792). Login .admin-login__panel: min(400px,100%), bg #101014, radius 12px (index.css:3814-3820). Collapses to 1 column at 900px (index.css:3840-3859).
(2) '.staff-*' (used by pages/staff/* incl. the EXISTING TurfOwnerPage.tsx at /staff/venue — 'Venue Portal'): .staff-shell grid 220px 1fr bg #000 (index.css:5766-5771); sidebar #080808 sticky 100vh; .staff-nav-btn 9px 12px radius 8px color rgba(245,245,245,0.65), --active bg rgba(255,255,255,0.1) #fff 700, --logout #f87171 (index.css:5808-5827). .staff-main padding clamp(24px,4vw,40px). .staff-section max-width 960px; .staff-h2 22px/700; .staff-stat-card padding 20px radius 14px bg rgba(255,255,255,0.04) border rgba(255,255,255,0.1), __value 32px/800, __label 12px uppercase 0.08em (index.css:5845-5849). Tables: .staff-table-wrap overflow-x auto radius 12px bordered; th 11px/700 uppercase 0.1em bg rgba(255,255,255,0.03); td 12px 14px border-bottom rgba(255,255,255,0.05); ro
--- keyFacts:
 * Styling = single global CSS file frontend/src/index.css (8040 lines) with CSS variables + BEM-ish classes; NO Tailwind, no CSS modules; occasional inline style={{marginTop:N}}
 * A turf-owner panel ALREADY EXISTS: pages/staff/TurfOwnerPage.tsx ('Venue Portal', /staff/venue) using the .staff-* class system (index.css:5737-5914) — new turf-owner admin pages should reuse .staff-shell / .staff-sidebar / .staff-nav-btn / .staff-main / .staff-section / .staff-h2 / .staff-stats-grid / .staff-stat-card / .staff-table-wrap / .staff-table / .staff-badge--* / .staff-action-btn / .sta
 * Admin shells are FLAT NEUTRAL DARK (bg #000/#0a0a0c, white-alpha borders rgba(255,255,255,0.06-0.12), no glass/teal) — deliberately plainer than the glassy teal public site; a second system .admin-* (index.css:3642-3868) backs layouts/AdminLayout.tsx + pages/admin/*
 * Core tokens (index.css:3-43): bg #060d1a/#0a1628, accent #0abfbc (--accent), bright #1de9e6, dim #087f7d, text #e8f4f4, muted rgba(200,235,235,0.65), --radius:18px, --radius-sm:12px, pill radius 999px
 * Fonts: 'DM Sans' (--font-body, everything) + 'Newsreader' serif (--font, display headings only); admin/staff shells override to system-ui (index.css:3648)
 * Buttons: .btn .btn-primary (cyan #0abfbc bg, dark #060d1a text, glow shadow 0 0 20px rgba(10,191,188,0.3)), .btn-secondary (outline white), .btn-ghost, .btn-sm — wrapped by components/ui/Button.tsx
 * Semantic colors: success #4ade80, error #f87171, warning/highlight #facc15, purple #a78bfa — always rendered as tinted pill/banner: color X on rgba(X,0.08-0.15) bg + rgba(X,0.2-0.3) 1px border, radius 8px or 999px
 * Public-site card hover formula: border-color→rgba(10,191,188,0.4), box-shadow 0 8px 32px rgba(10,191,188,0.15), translateY(-2px), transitions 0.15-0.2s (index.css:5960-5974)
 * Form inputs: .auth-input (public) bg rgba(255,255,255,0.05) border rgba(255,255,255,0.14) radius 10px; .admin-input bg #141418 radius 8px; error/success via .auth-error/.auth-success
 * framer-motion v10 installed but only used on landing sections; house pattern: initial={{opacity:0,y:40}} whileInView={{opacity:1,y:0}} viewport={{once:true,margin:'-80px'}} transition={{duration:0.6,ease:[0.22,1,0.36,1]}} (components/sections/TurfSection.tsx:6-13); admin/staff pages use NO motion
 * Loading skeletons: bg rgba(255,255,255,0.04), border rgba(255,255,255,0.07), animation skeleton-pulse 1.6s (opacity .5↔1, index.css:4508)
 * Dark theme only — no light mode, no prefers-color-scheme, html bg hardcoded #060d1a
 * Staff auth pattern: guard on user.is_venue_owner || user.is_admin, redirect /staff-login; API calls via fetch to `${import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL ?? 'http://127.0.0.1:8000'}` with Bearer token from localStorage 'cc_token' (TurfOwnerPage.tsx:11-29,48-59)
 * Table recipe to copy: <div className='staff-table-wrap'><table className='staff-table'> — th: 11px/700 uppercase letter-spacing .1em bg rgba(255,255,255,0.03); td: 12px 14px padding, border-bottom rgba(255,255,255,0.05); tr:hover td bg rgba(255,255,255,0.02)
 * Stat tile recipe: .staff-stats-grid (auto-fill minmax(160px,1fr) gap 14px) > .staff-stat-card (padding 20px, radius 14px, bg rgba(255,255,255,0.04), border rgba(255,255,255,0.1)) with __icon (emoji 28px), __value (32px/800), __label (12px uppercase muted)
 * Icons are emoji throughout (no icon library installed); brand assets at /branding/cc-mark.png and /branding/cc-full.png
 * Responsive: .staff-shell collapses grid 220px 1fr → 1fr at 768px with sidebar as horizontal wrap bar; .admin-shell collapses at 900px

from pydantic import BaseModel, Field


# ── Categories ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

class CategoryRead(BaseModel):
    id: int
    slug: str
    name: str
    type: str
    icon_url: str


# ── Venue ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

class VenueCreate(BaseModel):
    name: str = Field(min_length=2, max_length=200)
    description: str = Field(default="", max_length=2000)
    phone: str = Field(default="", max_length=20)
    email: str = Field(default="", max_length=255)
    website: str = Field(default="", max_length=500)
    address_line1: str = Field(default="", max_length=300)
    address_line2: str = Field(default="", max_length=300)
    city: str = Field(default="", max_length=120)
    state: str = Field(default="", max_length=120)
    postal_code: str = Field(default="", max_length=20)
    lat: str = Field(default="", max_length=20)
    lng: str = Field(default="", max_length=20)


class VenueUpdate(VenueCreate):
    name: str = Field(default="", max_length=200)


class VenueRead(BaseModel):
    id: int
    name: str
    slug: str
    description: str
    logo_url: str
    cover_url: str
    phone: str
    email: str
    website: str
    address_line1: str
    city: str
    state: str
    postal_code: str
    lat: str
    lng: str
    is_verified: bool
    is_active: bool


# ── Listing ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

class PhotoRead(BaseModel):
    id: int
    url: str
    caption: str
    sort_order: int


class SlotRead(BaseModel):
    id: int
    day_of_week: int
    specific_date: str
    start_time: str
    end_time: str
    max_bookings: int
    is_blocked: bool


class ListingCreate(BaseModel):
    category_id: int
    title: str = Field(min_length=2, max_length=200)
    description: str = Field(default="", max_length=2000)
    rules: str = Field(default="", max_length=2000)
    capacity: int = Field(default=0, ge=0)
    price_per_hour: int = Field(default=0, ge=0)
    price_per_session: int = Field(default=0, ge=0)
    duration_minutes: int = Field(default=60, ge=15)
    is_bookable: bool = True
    is_tournament_eligible: bool = False


class ListingRead(BaseModel):
    id: int
    venue_id: int
    category: CategoryRead
    title: str
    description: str
    rules: str
    capacity: int
    price_per_hour: int
    price_per_session: int
    duration_minutes: int
    is_bookable: bool
    is_tournament_eligible: bool
    is_active: bool
    photos: list[PhotoRead]
    amenities: list[str]


# ── Slots ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

class SlotCreate(BaseModel):
    day_of_week: int = Field(default=-1, ge=-1, le=6)
    specific_date: str = Field(default="", max_length=10)
    start_time: str = Field(max_length=5)
    end_time: str = Field(max_length=5)
    max_bookings: int = Field(default=1, ge=1)


# ── Booking ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

class BookingCreate(BaseModel):
    listing_id: int
    slot_id: int
    booking_date: str
    num_players: int = Field(default=1, ge=1)
    notes: str = Field(default="", max_length=500)


class BookingRead(BaseModel):
    id: int
    listing_id: int
    booking_date: str
    start_time: str
    end_time: str
    num_players: int
    status: str
    payment_status: str
    notes: str

"""
Venue, listing, booking service layer.
"""
import re
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session, joinedload

from app.models.venue import (
    Booking, Listing, ListingAmenity, ListingCategory,
    ListingPhoto, ListingSlot, Venue, VenueAdmin,
)
from app.schemas.venue import (
    BookingCreate, ListingCreate, SlotCreate, VenueCreate, VenueUpdate,
)


# ── Slug helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def _slugify(text: str) -> str:
    text = text.lower().strip()
    text = re.sub(r"[^\w\s-]", "", text)
    text = re.sub(r"[\s_-]+", "-", text)
    return text[:80]


def _unique_slug(db: Session, base: str, model) -> str:
    slug = _slugify(base)
    candidate = slug
    n = 1
    while db.query(model).filter(model.slug == candidate).first():
        n += 1
        candidate = f"{slug}-{n}"
    return candidate


# ── Categories ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def get_all_categories(db: Session) -> list[ListingCategory]:
    return db.query(ListingCategory).filter(ListingCategory.is_active == True).order_by(ListingCategory.name).all()  # noqa: E712


def get_category(db: Session, category_id: int) -> ListingCategory | None:
    return db.get(ListingCategory, category_id)


# ── Venues ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def create_venue(db: Session, payload: VenueCreate, owner_user_id: int) -> Venue:
    slug = _unique_slug(db, payload.name, Venue)
    venue = Venue(
        owner_user_id=owner_user_id,
        slug=slug,
        **payload.model_dump(),
    )
    db.add(venue)
    db.flush()
    # Auto-add owner as venue admin with role=owner
    admin = VenueAdmin(venue_id=venue.id, user_id=owner_user_id, role="owner")
    db.add(admin)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(venue)
    return venue


def get_venue(db: Session, venue_id: int) -> Venue | None:
    return (
        db.query(Venue)
        .options(joinedload(Venue.listings).joinedload(Listing.photos))
        .filter(Venue.id == venue_id)
        .first()
    )


def list_venues(db: Session, city: str = "", skip: int = 0, limit: int = 40) -> list[Venue]:
    q = db.query(Venue).filter(Venue.is_active == True)  # noqa: E712
    if city:
        q = q.filter(Venue.city.ilike(f"%{city}%"))
    return q.order_by(Venue.is_verified.desc(), Venue.name).offset(skip).limit(limit).all()


def update_venue(db: Session, venue: Venue, payload: VenueUpdate) -> Venue:
    for key, val in payload.model_dump(exclude_unset=True).items():
        if val:
            setattr(venue, key, val)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(venue)
    return venue


def get_user_venue(db: Session, user_id: int) -> Venue | None:
    """Return the venue owned by this user, if any."""
    return db.query(Venue).filter(Venue.owner_user_id == user_id, Venue.is_active == True).first()  # noqa: E712


def is_venue_staff(db: Session, venue_id: int, user_id: int) -> bool:
    return (
        db.query(VenueAdmin)
        .filter(
            VenueAdmin.venue_id == venue_id,
            VenueAdmin.user_id == user_id,
            VenueAdmin.is_active == True,  # noqa: E712
        )
        .first()
    ) is not None


# ── Listings ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def create_listing(db: Session, venue_id: int, payload: ListingCreate) -> Listing:
    listing = Listing(venue_id=venue_id, **payload.model_dump())
    db.add(listing)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(listing)
    return listing


def get_listing(db: Session, listing_id: int) -> Listing | None:
    return (
        db.query(Listing)
        .options(
            joinedload(Listing.photos),
            joinedload(Listing.amenities),
            joinedload(Listing.slots),
            joinedload(Listing.category),
        )
        .filter(Listing.id == listing_id)
        .first()
    )


def list_listings(db: Session, venue_id: int) -> list[Listing]:
    return (
        db.query(Listing)
        .options(joinedload(Listing.photos), joinedload(Listing.category))
        .filter(Listing.venue_id == venue_id, Listing.is_active == True)  # noqa: E712
        .all()
    )


def add_listing_photo(db: Session, listing_id: int, url: str, caption: str = "", sort_order: int = 1) -> ListingPhoto:
    # Enforce max 5 photos
    count = db.query(ListingPhoto).filter(ListingPhoto.listing_id == listing_id).count()
    if count >= 5:
        raise ValueError("Maximum 5 photos per listing")
    photo = ListingPhoto(listing_id=listing_id, url=url, caption=caption, sort_order=sort_order)
    db.add(photo)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(photo)
    return photo


def delete_listing_photo(db: Session, photo_id: int, listing_id: int) -> bool:
    photo = db.query(ListingPhoto).filter(
        ListingPhoto.id == photo_id, ListingPhoto.listing_id == listing_id
    ).first()
    if not photo:
        return False
    db.delete(photo)
    db.commit()
    return True


def set_amenities(db: Session, listing_id: int, labels: list[str]) -> None:
    db.query(ListingAmenity).filter(ListingAmenity.listing_id == listing_id).delete()
    for label in labels:
        if label.strip():
            db.add(ListingAmenity(listing_id=listing_id, label=label.strip()[:100]))
    db.commit()


def add_slot(db: Session, listing_id: int, payload: SlotCreate) -> ListingSlot:
    slot = ListingSlot(listing_id=listing_id, **payload.model_dump())
    db.add(slot)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(slot)
    return slot


# ── Bookings ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def create_booking(db: Session, user_id: int, payload: BookingCreate) -> Booking:
    slot = db.get(ListingSlot, payload.slot_id)
    if not slot:
        raise ValueError("Slot not found")
    booking = Booking(
        listing_id=payload.listing_id,
        slot_id=payload.slot_id,
        user_id=user_id,
        booking_date=payload.booking_date,
        start_time=slot.start_time,
        end_time=slot.end_time,
        num_players=payload.num_players,
        notes=payload.notes,
        status="confirmed",
    )
    db.add(booking)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(booking)
    return booking


def get_user_bookings(db: Session, user_id: int) -> list[Booking]:
    return (
        db.query(Booking)
        .filter(Booking.user_id == user_id)
        .order_by(Booking.booking_date.desc())
        .all()
    )


def get_venue_bookings(db: Session, venue_id: int) -> list[Booking]:
    return (
        db.query(Booking)
        .join(Listing, Booking.listing_id == Listing.id)
        .filter(Listing.venue_id == venue_id)
        .order_by(Booking.booking_date.desc())
        .all()
    )


def serialize_listing(listing: Listing) -> dict:
    return {
        "id": listing.id,
        "venue_id": listing.venue_id,
        "category": {
            "id": listing.category.id,
            "slug": listing.category.slug,
            "name": listing.category.name,
            "type": listing.category.type,
            "icon_url": listing.category.icon_url,
        } if listing.category else {},
        "title": listing.title,
        "description": listing.description,
        "rules": listing.rules,
        "capacity": listing.capacity,
        "price_per_hour": listing.price_per_hour,
        "price_per_session": listing.price_per_session,
        "duration_minutes": listing.duration_minutes,
        "is_bookable": listing.is_bookable,
        "is_tournament_eligible": listing.is_tournament_eligible,
        "is_active": listing.is_active,
        "photos": [
            {"id": p.id, "url": p.url, "caption": p.caption, "sort_order": p.sort_order}
            for p in listing.photos
        ],
        "amenities": [a.label for a in listing.amenities],
    }


def serialize_venue(venue: Venue) -> dict:
    return {
        "id": venue.id,
        "name": venue.name,
        "slug": venue.slug,
        "description": venue.description,
        "logo_url": venue.logo_url,
        "cover_url": venue.cover_url,
        "phone": venue.phone,
        "email": venue.email,
        "website": venue.website,
        "address_line1": venue.address_line1,
        "city": venue.city,
        "state": venue.state,
        "postal_code": venue.postal_code,
        "lat": venue.lat,
        "lng": venue.lng,
        "is_verified": venue.is_verified,
        "is_active": venue.is_active,
    }

# ── Slug helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def _slugify(text: str) -> str:

# ── Categories ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def get_all_categories(db: Session) -> list[ListingCategory]:

def get_category(db: Session, category_id: int) -> ListingCategory | None:

# ── Venues ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def create_venue(db: Session, payload: VenueCreate, owner_user_id: int) -> Venue:

    return text[:80]

    candidate = slug

"""
Venue, listing, booking service layer.
"""
import re
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session, joinedload

from app.models.user import User
from app.models.venue import (
    Booking, Listing, ListingAmenity, ListingCategory,
    ListingPhoto, ListingSlot, Venue, VenueAdmin,
)
from app.schemas.venue import (
    BookingCreate, ListingCreate, ListingUpdate, SlotCreate, VenueCreate, VenueUpdate,
)


# ── Slug helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def _slugify(text: str) -> str:
    text = text.lower().strip()
    text = re.sub(r"[^\w\s-]", "", text)
    text = re.sub(r"[\s_-]+", "-", text)
    return text[:80]


def _unique_slug(db: Session, base: str, model) -> str:
    slug = _slugify(base)
    candidate = slug
    n = 1
    while db.query(model).filter(model.slug == candidate).first():
        n += 1
        candidate = f"{slug}-{n}"
    return candidate


# ── Categories ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def get_all_categories(db: Session) -> list[ListingCategory]:
    return db.query(ListingCategory).filter(ListingCategory.is_active == True).order_by(ListingCategory.name).all()  # noqa: E712


def get_category(db: Session, category_id: int) -> ListingCategory | None:
    return db.get(ListingCategory, category_id)


# ── Venues ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def create_venue(db: Session, payload: VenueCreate, owner_user_id: int) -> Venue:
    slug = _unique_slug(db, payload.name, Venue)
    venue = Venue(
        owner_user_id=owner_user_id,
        slug=slug,
        **payload.model_dump(),
    )
    db.add(venue)
    db.flush()
    # Auto-add owner as venue admin with role=owner
    admin = VenueAdmin(venue_id=venue.id, user_id=owner_user_id, role="owner")
    db.add(admin)
    # Creating a venue makes the user a venue owner (grants staff-portal access)
    owner = db.get(User, owner_user_id)
    if owner and not owner.is_venue_owner:
        owner.is_venue_owner = True
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(venue)
    return venue


def get_venue(db: Session, venue_id: int) -> Venue | None:
    return (
        db.query(Venue)
        .options(joinedload(Venue.listings).joinedload(Listing.photos))
        .filter(Venue.id == venue_id)
        .first()
    )


def list_venues(db: Session, city: str = "", skip: int = 0, limit: int = 40) -> list[Venue]:
    q = db.query(Venue).filter(Venue.is_active == True)  # noqa: E712
    if city:
        q = q.filter(Venue.city.ilike(f"%{city}%"))
    return q.order_by(Venue.is_verified.desc(), Venue.name).offset(skip).limit(limit).all()


def update_venue(db: Session, venue: Venue, payload: VenueUpdate) -> Venue:
    for key, val in payload.model_dump(exclude_unset=True).items():
        if val is None:
            continue
        if key == "name" and not val.strip():
            continue  # never blank out the venue name
        setattr(venue, key, val)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(venue)
    return venue


def get_user_venue(db: Session, user_id: int) -> Venue | None:
    """Return the venue owned by this user, if any."""
    return db.query(Venue).filter(Venue.owner_user_id == user_id, Venue.is_active == True).first()  # noqa: E712


def is_venue_staff(db: Session, venue_id: int, user_id: int) -> bool:
    return (
        db.query(VenueAdmin)
        .filter(
            VenueAdmin.venue_id == venue_id,
            VenueAdmin.user_id == user_id,
            VenueAdmin.is_active == True,  # noqa: E712
        )
        .first()
    ) is not None


# ── Listings ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def create_listing(db: Session, venue_id: int, payload: ListingCreate) -> Listing:
    listing = Listing(venue_id=venue_id, **payload.model_dump())
    db.add(listing)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(listing)
    return listing


def get_listing(db: Session, listing_id: int) -> Listing | None:
    return (
        db.query(Listing)
        .options(
            joinedload(Listing.photos),
            joinedload(Listing.amenities),
            joinedload(Listing.slots),
            joinedload(Listing.category),
        )
        .filter(Listing.id == listing_id)
        .first()
    )


def list_listings(db: Session, venue_id: int) -> list[Listing]:
    return (
        db.query(Listing)
        .options(joinedload(Listing.photos), joinedload(Listing.category))
        .filter(Listing.venue_id == venue_id, Listing.is_active == True)  # noqa: E712
        .all()
    )


def update_listing(db: Session, listing: Listing, payload: ListingUpdate) -> Listing:
    data = payload.model_dump(exclude_unset=True)
    if "category_id" in data and data["category_id"] is not None:
        if not db.get(ListingCategory, data["category_id"]):
            raise ValueError("Category not found")
    for key, val in data.items():
        if val is not None:
            setattr(listing, key, val)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(listing)
    return listing


def add_listing_photo(db: Session, listing_id: int, url: str, caption: str = "", sort_order: int = 1) -> ListingPhoto:
    # Enforce max 5 photos
    count = db.query(ListingPhoto).filter(ListingPhoto.listing_id == listing_id).count()
    if count >= 5:
        raise ValueError("Maximum 5 photos per listing")
    photo = ListingPhoto(listing_id=listing_id, url=url, caption=caption, sort_order=sort_order)
    db.add(photo)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(photo)
    return photo


def delete_listing_photo(db: Session, photo_id: int, listing_id: int) -> bool:
    photo = db.query(ListingPhoto).filter(
        ListingPhoto.id == photo_id, ListingPhoto.listing_id == listing_id
    ).first()
    if not photo:
        return False
    db.delete(photo)
    db.commit()
    return True


def set_amenities(db: Session, listing_id: int, labels: list[str]) -> None:
    db.query(ListingAmenity).filter(ListingAmenity.listing_id == listing_id).delete()
    for label in labels:
        if label.strip():
            db.add(ListingAmenity(listing_id=listing_id, label=label.strip()[:100]))
    db.commit()


def add_slot(db: Session, listing_id: int, payload: SlotCreate) -> ListingSlot:
    slot = ListingSlot(listing_id=listing_id, **payload.model_dump())
    db.add(slot)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(slot)
    return slot


# ── Bookings ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def create_booking(db: Session, user_id: int, payload: BookingCreate) -> Booking:
    slot = db.get(ListingSlot, payload.slot_id)
    if not slot:
        raise ValueError("Slot not found")
    booking = Booking(
        listing_id=payload.listing_id,
        slot_id=payload.slot_id,
        user_id=user_id,
        booking_date=payload.booking_date,
        start_time=slot.start_time,
        end_time=slot.end_time,
        num_players=payload.num_players,
        notes=payload.notes,
        status="confirmed",
    )
    db.add(booking)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(booking)
    return booking


def get_user_bookings(db: Session, user_id: int) -> list[Booking]:
    return (
        db.query(Booking)
        .filter(Booking.user_id == user_id)
        .order_by(Booking.booking_date.desc())
        .all()
    )


def get_venue_bookings(db: Session, venue_id: int) -> list[Booking]:
    return (
        db.query(Booking)
        .join(Listing, Booking.listing_id == Listing.id)
        .filter(Listing.venue_id == venue_id)
        .order_by(Booking.booking_date.desc())
        .all()
    )


def serialize_listing(listing: Listing) -> dict:
    return {
        "id": listing.id,
        "venue_id": listing.venue_id,
        "category": {
            "id": listing.category.id,
            "slug": listing.category.slug,
            "name": listing.category.name,
            "type": listing.category.type,
            "icon_url": listing.category.icon_url,
        } if listing.category else {},
        "title": listing.title,
        "description": listing.description,
        "rules": listing.rules,
        "capacity": listing.capacity,
        "price_per_hour": listing.price_per_hour,
        "price_per_session": listing.price_per_session,
        "duration_minutes": listing.duration_minutes,
        "is_bookable": listing.is_bookable,
        "is_tournament_eligible": listing.is_tournament_eligible,
        "is_active": listing.is_active,
        "photos": [
            {"id": p.id, "url": p.url, "caption": p.caption, "sort_order": p.sort_order}
            for p in listing.photos
        ],
        "amenities": [a.label for a in listing.amenities],
    }


def serialize_venue(venue: Venue) -> dict:
    return {
        "id": venue.id,
        "name": venue.name,
        "slug": venue.slug,
        "description": venue.description,
        "logo_url": venue.logo_url,
        "cover_url": venue.cover_url,
        "phone": venue.phone,
        "email": venue.email,
        "website": venue.website,
        "address_line1": venue.address_line1,
        "city": venue.city,
        "state": venue.state,
        "postal_code": venue.postal_code,
        "lat": venue.lat,
        "lng": venue.lng,
        "is_verified": venue.is_verified,
        "is_active": venue.is_active,
    }

toolUseResult.originalFile:
"""
Venue, listing, booking service layer.
"""
import re
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session, joinedload

from app.models.user import User
from app.models.venue import (
    Booking, Listing, ListingAmenity, ListingCategory,
    ListingPhoto, ListingSlot, Venue, VenueAdmin,
)
from app.schemas.venue import (
    BookingCreate, ListingCreate, ListingUpdate, SlotCreate, VenueCreate, VenueUpdate,
)


# ── Slug helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def _slugify(text: str) -> str:
    text = text.lower().strip()
    text = re.sub(r"[^\w\s-]", "", text)
    text = re.sub(r"[\s_-]+", "-", text)
    return text[:80]


def _unique_slug(db: Session, base: str, model) -> str:
    slug = _slugify(base)
    candidate = slug
    n = 1
    while db.query(model).filter(model.slug == candidate).first():
        n += 1
        candidate = f"{slug}-{n}"
    return candidate


# ── Categories ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def get_all_categories(db: Session) -> list[ListingCategory]:
    return db.query(ListingCategory).filter(ListingCategory.is_active == True).order_by(ListingCategory.name).all()  # noqa: E712


def get_category(db: Session, category_id: int) -> ListingCategory | None:
    return db.get(ListingCategory, category_id)


# ── Venues ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def create_venue(db: Session, payload: VenueCreate, owner_user_id: int) -> Venue:
    slug = _unique_slug(db, payload.name, Venue)
    venue = Venue(
        owner_user_id=owner_user_id,
        slug=slug,
        **payload.model_dump(),
    )
    db.add(venue)
    db.flush()
    # Auto-add owner as venue admin with role=owner
    admin = VenueAdmin(venue_id=venue.id, user_id=owner_user_id, role="owner")
    db.add(admin)
    # Creating a venue makes the user a venue owner (grants staff-portal access)
    owner = db.get(User, owner_user_id)
    if owner and not owner.is_venue_owner:
        owner.is_venue_owner = True
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(venue)
    return venue


def get_venue(db: Session, venue_id: int) -> Venue | None:
    return (
        db.query(Venue)
        .options(joinedload(Venue.listings).joinedload(Listing.photos))
        .filter(Venue.id == venue_id)
        .first()
    )


def list_venues(db: Session, city: str = "", skip: int = 0, limit: int = 40) -> list[Venue]:
    q = db.query(Venue).filter(Venue.is_active == True)  # noqa: E712
    if city:
        q = q.filter(Venue.city.ilike(f"%{city}%"))
    return q.order_by(Venue.is_verified.desc(), Venue.name).offset(skip).limit(limit).all()


def update_venue(db: Session, venue: Venue, payload: VenueUpdate) -> Venue:
    for key, val in payload.model_dump(exclude_unset=True).items():
        if val is None:
            continue
        if key == "name" and not val.strip():
            continue  # never blank out the venue name
        setattr(venue, key, val)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(venue)
    return venue


def get_user_venue(db: Session, user_id: int) -> Venue | None:
    """Return the venue owned by this user, if any."""
    return db.query(Venue).filter(Venue.owner_user_id == user_id, Venue.is_active == True).first()  # noqa: E712


def is_venue_staff(db: Session, venue_id: int, user_id: int) -> bool:
    return (
        db.query(VenueAdmin)
        .filter(
            VenueAdmin.venue_id == venue_id,
            VenueAdmin.user_id == user_id,
            VenueAdmin.is_active == True,  # noqa: E712
        )
        .first()
    ) is not None


# ── Listings ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def create_listing(db: Session, venue_id: int, payload: ListingCreate) -> Listing:
    listing = Listing(venue_id=venue_id, **payload.model_dump())
    db.add(listing)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(listing)
    return listing


def get_listing(db: Session, listing_id: int) -> Listing | None:
    return (
        db.query(Listing)
        .options(
            joinedload(Listing.photos),
            joinedload(Listing.amenities),
            joinedload(Listing.slots),
            joinedload(Listing.category),
        )
        .filter(Listing.id == listing_id)
        .first()
    )


def list_listings(db: Session, venue_id: int) -> list[Listing]:
    return (
        db.query(Listing)
        .options(joinedload(Listing.photos), joinedload(Listing.category))
        .filter(Listing.venue_id == venue_id, Listing.is_active == True)  # noqa: E712
        .all()
    )


def update_listing(db: Session, listing: Listing, payload: ListingUpdate) -> Listing:
    data = payload.model_dump(exclude_unset=True)
    if "category_id" in data and data["category_id"] is not None:
        if not db.get(ListingCategory, data["category_id"]):
            raise ValueError("Category not found")
    for key, val in data.items():
        if val is not None:
            setattr(listing, key, val)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(listing)
    return listing


def add_listing_photo(db: Session, listing_id: int, url: str, caption: str = "", sort_order: int = 1) -> ListingPhoto:
    # Enforce max 5 photos
    count = db.query(ListingPhoto).filter(ListingPhoto.listing_id == listing_id).count()
    if count >= 5:
        raise ValueError("Maximum 5 photos per listing")
    photo = ListingPhoto(listing_id=listing_id, url=url, caption=caption, sort_order=sort_order)
    db.add(photo)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(photo)
    return photo


def delete_listing_photo(db: Session, photo_id: int, listing_id: int) -> bool:
    photo = db.query(ListingPhoto).filter(
        ListingPhoto.id == photo_id, ListingPhoto.listing_id == listing_id
    ).first()
    if not photo:
        return False
    db.delete(photo)
    db.commit()
    return True


def set_amenities(db: Session, listing_id: int, labels: list[str]) -> None:
    db.query(ListingAmenity).filter(ListingAmenity.listing_id == listing_id).delete()
    for label in labels:
        if label.strip():
            db.add(ListingAmenity(listing_id=listing_id, label=label.strip()[:100]))
    db.commit()


def add_slot(db: Session, listing_id: int, payload: SlotCreate) -> ListingSlot:
    slot = ListingSlot(listing_id=listing_id, **payload.model_dump())
    db.add(slot)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(slot)
    return slot


def delete_slot(db: Session, slot_id: int, listing_id: int) -> bool:
    slot = db.query(ListingSlot).filter(
        ListingSlot.id == slot_id, ListingSlot.listing_id == listing_id
    ).first()
    if not slot:
        return False
    db.delete(slot)
    db.commit()
    return True


# ── Bookings ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def create_booking(db: Session, user_id: int, payload: BookingCreate) -> Booking:
    slot = db.get(ListingSlot, payload.slot_id)
    if not slot:
        raise ValueError("Slot not found")
    booking = Booking(
        listing_id=payload.listing_id,
        slot_id=payload.slot_id,
        user_id=user_id,
        booking_date=payload.booking_date,
        start_time=slot.start_time,
        end_time=slot.end_time,
        num_players=payload.num_players,
        notes=payload.notes,
        status="confirmed",
    )
    db.add(booking)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(booking)
    return booking


def get_user_bookings(db: Session, user_id: int) -> list[Booking]:
    return (
        db.query(Booking)
        .filter(Booking.user_id == user_id)
        .order_by(Booking.booking_date.desc())
        .all()
    )


def get_venue_bookings(db: Session, venue_id: int) -> list[Booking]:
    return (
        db.query(Booking)
        .join(Listing, Booking.listing_id == Listing.id)
        .filter(Listing.venue_id == venue_id)
        .order_by(Booking.booking_date.desc())
        .all()
    )


BOOKING_STATUSES = {"pending", "confirmed", "cancelled", "completed", "no_show"}


def update_booking_status(db: Session, booking: Booking, status: str) -> Booking:
    if status not in BOOKING_STATUSES:
        raise ValueError(f"Status must be one of: {', '.join(sorted(BOOKING_STATUSES))}")
    booking.status = status
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(booking)
    return booking


def serialize_listing(listing: Listing) -> dict:
    return {
        "id": listing.id,
        "venue_id": listing.venue_id,
        "category": {
            "id": listing.category.id,
            "slug": listing.category.slug,
            "name": listing.category.name,
            "type": listing.category.type,
            "icon_url": listing.category.icon_url,
        } if listing.category else {},
        "title": listing.title,
        "description": listing.description,
        "rules": listing.rules,
        "capacity": listing.capacity,
        "price_per_hour": listing.price_per_hour,
        "price_per_session": listing.price_per_session,
        "duration_minutes": listing.duration_minutes,
        "is_bookable": listing.is_bookable,
        "is_tournament_eligible": listing.is_tournament_eligible,
        "is_active": listing.is_active,
        "photos": [
            {"id": p.id, "url": p.url, "caption": p.caption, "sort_order": p.sort_order}
            for p in listing.photos
        ],
        "amenities": [a.label for a in listing.amenities],
    }


def serialize_venue(venue: Venue) -> dict:
    return {
        "id": venue.id,
        "name": venue.name,
        "slug": venue.slug,
        "description": venue.description,
        "logo_url": venue.logo_url,
        "cover_url": venue.cover_url,
        "phone": venue.phone,
        "email": venue.email,
        "website": venue.website,
        "address_line1": venue.address_line1,
        "city": venue.city,
        "state": venue.state,
        "postal_code": venue.postal_code,
        "lat": venue.lat,
        "lng": venue.lng,
        "is_verified": venue.is_verified,
        "is_active": venue.is_active,
    }

input.content:
# Turf-Owner Admin Panel — Plan

## Context

Turf owners need their own admin panel: a **separate login**, a dashboard listing **their** turf(s), full editing (venue details, listings/turfs, photos, amenities, time slots, bookings), with every change **immediately visible to normal users** browsing `/turf` and `/venue/:id`. Must match the existing design language and be tested end-to-end.

**Key discovery (mapping complete):** the app already has strong foundations — `User.is_venue_owner` flag, `Venue.owner_user_id` FK, `VenueAdmin` staff table, a hidden `/staff-login` page, and a skeletal "Venue Portal" (`frontend/src/pages/staff/TurfOwnerPage.tsx` at `/staff/venue`) that can only *view* data + create listings. Public pages read live API data, so owner edits reflect automatically once editing works. **No DB migrations needed.**

## Already done (edits in working tree)

### Backend (complete, import-verified, routes confirmed registered)
- `backend/app/schemas/venue.py` — added `ListingUpdate` (partial), `BookingStatusUpdate`, `logo_url`/`cover_url` on `VenueCreate`/`VenueUpdate`
- `backend/app/services/venue.py` — added `update_listing`, `delete_slot`, `get_booking`, `update_booking_status` (validates status enum); `serialize_listing` now includes `slots`; `list_listings(include_inactive=)` with `selectinload`; fixed `update_venue` falsy-value bug; `create_venue` now grants `is_venue_owner=True` to the creator
- `backend/app/api/routes/venues.py` — new routes: `PUT /api/listings/{id}` (was documented but **missing**), `DELETE /api/listings/{id}/slots/{slot_id}`, `PUT /api/bookings/{id}/status`; all gated by `is_admin or is_venue_staff(...)` (existing pattern)
- `backend/app/api/routes/admin.py` — `/api/staff/my-venue` now returns inactive listings too (owners can re-activate)

### Frontend (partial)
- `frontend/src/lib/ccApi.ts` — added `ListingSlot`, `StaffBooking`, `MyVenueData` types; `slots` on `VenueListing`; methods: `updateListing`, `deleteListingPhoto`, `deleteSlot`, `updateBookingStatus`, `myVenue`, `myTournaments`, `assignMatchAdmin`

## Remaining work

### 1. Rewrite `frontend/src/pages/staff/TurfOwnerPage.tsx` (the owner panel)
Keep the existing `.staff-*` flat-dark design system (index.css:5737-5914) and the existing guard (`user.is_venue_owner || user.is_admin`, redirect `/staff-login`). Use `ccApi` for all calls (replaces local `staffReq` except where unneeded). Tabs:
- **Overview** — `.staff-stats-grid` stat cards (listings, active, bookings, pending), venue summary, "View public page →" link to `/venue/{id}`
- **Venue** — edit form for all venue fields (name, description, phone, email, website, address, city, state, postal code, logo_url, cover_url) via `ccApi.updateVenue`; when no venue exists, show a **create-venue form** (`ccApi.createVenue`) replacing the current "use API docs" link
- **Listings** (turfs) — existing create form + per-listing expandable editor:
  - fields: title, category, description, rules, capacity, ₹/hr and ₹/session (UI rupees ↔ paise ×100), duration, bookable, tournament-eligible, **active/hidden toggle** → `ccApi.updateListing`
  - photos: thumbnail grid, upload (≤5) `uploadListingPhoto`, delete `deleteListingPhoto`
  - amenities: chip editor → `setAmenities`
  - slots: table (day-of-week names, Mon=0…Sun=6, -1=specific date) + add form `addSlot` + delete `deleteSlot`
- **Bookings** — table with status `<select>` per row → `updateBookingStatus` (pending/confirmed/cancelled/completed/no_show)
- **Tournaments** — keep existing assign-match-admin flow (now via `ccApi.assignMatchAdmin`)
- Refetch `myVenue()` after each mutation; success/error banners with existing `.staff-msg` / `.auth-error` patterns

### 2. Separate owner login polish
- `frontend/src/App.tsx` — add route alias `/partner-login` → `StaffLoginPage` (memorable separate URL for turf owners)
- `frontend/src/pages/staff/StaffLoginPage.tsx` — copy tweak: "Partner Portal — for turf owners & Champion Circuit staff"
- Owner provisioning stays as-is: super admin creates owner accounts (SuperAdminPage has this UI) *or* any authed user who creates a venue is auto-granted `is_venue_owner` (backend change above)

### 3. Small CSS additions (`frontend/src/index.css`, append near staff block)
`.staff-photo-grid/.staff-photo`, `.staff-chip-row/.staff-chip`, `.staff-form-grid`, `.staff-subsection` — reuse existing tokens (white-alpha borders, radius 8–14px, flat neutral dark). No new colors.

## Verification (task #5)

1. `npm run typecheck` + `npm run build` in `frontend/`; backend import check (done once already)
2. **Isolated e2e rig** (leaves user's running `:8000` Neon stack untouched): second backend on `:8001` with `DATABASE_URL=sqlite:///./test_e2e.db` + `ENVIRONMENT=local`; seed owner user + venue + listing via API
3. **API e2e script**: owner login → my-venue → update venue → create/edit listing → amenities → slots add/delete → booking status → verify public `GET /api/venues/{id}` reflects every change → authz negatives (regular user 403, other owner 403, listing edit by non-staff 403)
4. **UI e2e**: second vite dev server on `:5174` with `VITE_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8001`; drive browser (chromium) through: `/partner-login` → sign in as owner → edit turf price/description → open `/venue/{id}` as public → confirm change visible; screenshots
5. Multi-agent adversarial **code-review workflow** on the full diff; fix confirmed findings; re-run typecheck/build
6. Restart the user's `:8000` backend (started without `--reload`) so new endpoints go live in their dev stack

"""
Seed listing categories.
Run once: .venv/bin/python seed_categories.py
"""
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, ".")

from app.db.session import SessionLocal, Base, engine
from app.models.user import User          # noqa
from app.models.venue import ListingCategory
from app.models.match import Match        # noqa
from app.models.voucher import Partner    # noqa
from app.models.waitlist import WaitlistEntry  # noqa

Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)

CATEGORIES = [
    # Physical sports
    {"slug": "cricket",       "name": "Cricket",         "type": "physical"},
    {"slug": "football",      "name": "Football",        "type": "physical"},
    {"slug": "badminton",     "name": "Badminton",       "type": "physical"},
    {"slug": "basketball",    "name": "Basketball",      "type": "physical"},
    {"slug": "table_tennis",  "name": "Table Tennis",    "type": "physical"},
    {"slug": "kabaddi",       "name": "Kabaddi",         "type": "physical"},
    {"slug": "tennis",        "name": "Tennis",          "type": "physical"},
    {"slug": "volleyball",    "name": "Volleyball",      "type": "physical"},
    {"slug": "swimming",      "name": "Swimming",        "type": "physical"},
    {"slug": "boxing",        "name": "Boxing / MMA",    "type": "physical"},
    # Esports
    {"slug": "valorant",      "name": "Valorant",        "type": "esports"},
    {"slug": "bgmi",          "name": "BGMI",            "type": "esports"},
    {"slug": "pubg",          "name": "PUBG",            "type": "esports"},
    {"slug": "free_fire",     "name": "Free Fire",       "type": "esports"},
    {"slug": "fifa",          "name": "EA FC / FIFA",    "type": "esports"},
    {"slug": "cod",           "name": "Call of Duty",    "type": "esports"},
    {"slug": "playstation",   "name": "PlayStation",     "type": "esports"},
    {"slug": "pc_gaming",     "name": "PC Gaming",       "type": "esports"},
    {"slug": "chess",         "name": "Chess",           "type": "esports"},
    {"slug": "carrom",        "name": "Carrom",          "type": "esports"},
    # Services / food
    {"slug": "food_beverages","name": "Food & Beverages","type": "food"},
    {"slug": "merchandise",   "name": "Merchandise",     "type": "merchandise"},
    {"slug": "coaching",      "name": "Coaching",        "type": "service"},
    {"slug": "fitness",       "name": "Gym / Fitness",   "type": "service"},
]

db = SessionLocal()

created = 0
for cat in CATEGORIES:
